articles.title: Combined bladder-kidney transplantation: first-in-human feasibility trial
articles.authors: Nassiri N, Gill IS

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Current surgical treatments for terminal bladder dysfunction include intestinal-based reconstructive approaches that carry substantial morbidity, particularly in immunosuppressed patients. These limitations prompted investigation into vascularised composite bladder allograft transplantation as a novel reconstructive alternative.
abstract.textZh: 目前針對末期膀胱功能障礙的手術治療包括基於腸道的重建方法，其發生率很高，特別是在免疫抑制患者身上。這些限制促使人們對帶血管複合膀胱同種異體移植作為一種新的重建替代方案進行研究。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This is an ongoing phase 0 feasibility trial of decreased-donor bladder or combined bladder-kidney transplantation at two academic medical centres in the USA. Eligible bladder transplant recipients are adults aged 18-70 years with non-functional, poorly compliant bladders. Ideal candidates for this trial include patients with pre-existing or concurrent immunosuppression requirements. The primary endpoints are technical feasibility, defined as completion of the operation with restoration of urinary continuity with graft perfusion, and patient safety, reported through adverse events. Here, we report on the safety, feasibility, and immunological and functional outcomes from the first-in-human kidney and bladder transplant as part of the study. This study was registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT06337942 and NCT05462561, and is ongoing.
abstract.textZh: 這是美國兩個學術醫療中心正在進行的減少捐贈膀胱或合併膀胱腎移植的 0 期可行性試驗。符合資格的膀胱移植受者是年齡在 18-70 歲、膀胱無功能、順應性差的成年人。該試驗的理想候選者包括先前存在或同時存在免疫抑制需求的患者。主要終點是技術可行性，定義為手術完成並透過移植物灌注恢復泌尿連續性，以及透過不良事件報告的患者安全。在這裡，作為研究的一部分，我們報告了首次人體腎臟和膀胱移植的安全性、可行性以及免疫學和功能結果。這項研究已在 ClinicalTrials.gov 註冊，NCT06337942 和 NCT05462561，並且正在進行中。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: The surgery was carried out in May, 2025. The patient was a 41-year-old anephric male with a terminal bladder and end-stage kidney disease from hypertension who had been on peritoneal dialysis for 7 years. Kidney and bladder were recovered from an ABO compatible 35-year-old female donor with terminal anoxic brain injury. The 8 h surgery was successful, with both organs having excellent perfusion and no intraoperative complications. On postoperative day 25, the patient developed a urine leak from the suprapubic tube tract and wound breakdown (Clavien-Dindo 4), which was managed surgically with good recovery. More than 6 months post-transplantation, the patient maintained appropriate renal (estimation glomerular filtration rate 52-55 mL/min per 1·73 m2) and bladder allograft function, with intact sensation and appropriate urge, bladder capacity of 600 mL, complete continence, spontaneous voiding with maximum flow rate 17 mL/s, and complete emptying with negligible post-void residual urine. The patient is maintained on triple therapy immunosuppression with tacrolimus, mycophenolate mofetil, and prednisone. Serial bladder biopsies have remained negative for cell-mediated or antibody-mediated rejection.
abstract.textZh: 手術於2025年5月進行。患者為男性，41歲，無腎臟病，膀胱末期，高血壓末期腎臟病，腹膜透析7年。腎臟和膀胱取自一位 ABO 血型相容的 35 歲女性捐贈者，患有末期缺氧性腦損傷。 8小時手術非常成功，雙臟器灌注良好，無術中併發症。術後第 25 天，患者出現恥骨上管漏尿和傷口破裂 (Clavien-Dindo 4)，經手術治療後恢復良好。移植後6個多月，患者保持適當的腎（估計腎小球濾過率52-55 mL/min/1·73 m2）和膀胱同種異體功能，感覺完整，衝動適當，膀胱容量600 mL，完全節制，自主排尿，最大流速17 mL/s，完全排空，排尿後殘餘尿可忽略不計。患者繼續接受他克莫司、嗎替麥考酚酯和潑尼松三聯免疫抑制療法。連續膀胱活檢對於細胞介導或抗體介導的排斥反應仍然呈現陰性。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: The first-in-human combined bladder-kidney transplantation demonstrates the technical feasibility of vascularised composite bladder allograft transplantation, with sustained bladder allograft function, sensation, continence, and voiding parameters, and no evidence of rejection beyond 6 months. These findings suggest bladder transplantation might represent a viable option for select patients with terminal bladder dysfunction, particularly those already requiring immunosuppression.
abstract.textZh: 首例人體膀胱-腎臟聯合移植證明了帶血管複合同種異體膀胱移植移植的技術可行性，具有持續的同種異體膀胱移植功能、感覺、節制和排尿參數，並且沒有超過 6 個月的排斥反應證據。這些發現表明，膀胱移植可能是某些患有晚期膀胱功能障礙的患者的可行選擇，特別是那些已經需要免疫抑制的患者。

abstract.label: FUNDING
abstract.text: American Urological Association's Research Scholar Award, the National Kidney Registry, OneLegacy, and University of California Los Angeles Department of Urology.
abstract.textZh: 美國泌尿外科協會研究學者獎、國家腎臟登記處、OneLegacy 和加州大學洛杉磯分校泌尿科。

articles.titleZh: 膀胱腎臟聯合移植：首次人體可行性試驗

articles.title: Patellar resurfacing in total knee replacement: 20-year clinical and economic results of a large multicentre, randomised controlled trial in the UK
articles.authors: Murray DW, Hudson J, Dakin H, MacLennan G, Little M, Gray A, Breeman S, Campbell MK

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: There is conflicting evidence regarding the merits of patellar resurfacing during total knee replacement (TKR), as previous randomised controlled trials (RCTs) have been under-powered and with follow-up of ten years or less.
abstract.textZh: 關於全膝關節置換術 (TKR) 期間髕骨表面置換的優點，存在相互矛盾的證據，因為先前的隨機對照試驗 (RCT) 效力不足，且追蹤時間為十年或更短。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: A pragmatic, multicentre, open-label RCT was initiated in 1999 in the UK. Within a partial-factorial design, participants were randomly allocated to receive or not receive patellar resurfacing during primary TKR and were followed up for 20 years. Adult (aged ≥18 years) patients due to have a primary TKR under the care of a collaborating surgeon were eligible. Participants were allocated (1:1) using an automated telephone service stratified by surgeon, with minimisation according to the patients' age (<60 years, 60-79 years, ≥80 years), sex, and location of d isease. The primary outcome measure was the Oxford Knee Score (OKS), analysed using repeated measures mixed-effects linear regression analysis with marginal differences reported. Secondary measures included the 12-Item Short Form Health Survey (SF-12), the European Quality of Life 5-Dimensions 3-Levels (EQ-5D-3L), costs, cost-effectiveness, and subsequent knee surgery. This trial is registered with ISRCTN Registry, ISRCTN45837371.
abstract.textZh: 一項務實、多中心、開放標籤的隨機對照試驗於 1999 年在英國啟動。在部分因素設計中，參與者在初次 TKR 期間被隨機分配接受或不接受髕骨表面置換術，並追蹤 20 年。在合作外科醫生的護理下進行初次 TKR 的成年（年齡≥18 歲）患者符合資格。參與者透過外科醫師分層的自動電話服務進行分配（1:1），並根據患者的年齡（<60 歲、60-79 歲、≥80 歲）、性別和疾病部位進行最小化分配。主要結果指標為牛津膝評分 (OKS)，使用重複測量混合效應線性迴歸分析進行分析，並報告邊際差異。次要指標包括 12 項簡短健康調查 (SF-12)、歐洲生活品質 5 維 3 級 (EQ-5D-3L)、費用、成本效益以及隨後的膝關節手術。本試驗已在 ISRCTN 註冊中心註冊，ISRCTN45837371。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between April 8, 1999, and Jan 13, 2003, 1715 participants (955 female and 760 male; mean age 70 years [SD 8], mean BMI 29·7 kg/m2) were randomly assigned: 861 to patellar resurfacing and 854 to no resurfacing. At the 20-year follow-up, 132 participants in the patellar resurfacing group and 110 participants in the non-resurfacing group provided outcome data, although marginal differences included earlier data for participants who died or had missing 20-year data. The marginal difference in OKS over the whole 20-year follow-up was 0·76 (95% CI -0·08 to 1·59; p=0·076) in favour of patellar resurfacing. During the 20-year follow-up period, although not significant, differences in OKS, SF-12, and EQ-5D-3L, readmissions, minor or intermediate operations, patella-related operations, major operations, and complications all favoured patellar resurfacing. At 20 years, the resurfaced group accrued significantly more quality-adjusted life-years (QALYs) than the non-resurfaced group (7·295 vs 6·884; difference 0·380, 95% CI 0·061 to 0·700; p=0·020). However, QALY differences were smaller in a sensitivity analysis assuming no difference in mortality (7·209 vs 6·964; difference 0·183, 95% CI -0·034 to 0·400; p=0·10). The cost of readmissions was non-significantly lower in the resurfaced group and offset the higher cost of primary TKR; therefore, overall 20-year health-care costs per participant were similar (£10 825 vs £10 889; difference -£6, 95% CI -£721 to £708; p=0·99).
abstract.textZh: 1999年4月8日至2003年1月13日期間，1715名參與者（955名女性和760名男性；平均年齡70歲[SD 8]，平均BMI 29·7 kg/m2）被隨機分配：861名接受髕骨表面置換，854名不接受表面重修。在 20 年的追蹤中，髕骨表面置換組的 132 名參與者和非表面置換組的 110 名參與者提供了結果數據，儘管邊際差異包括死亡或缺失 20 年數據的參與者的早期數據。整個 20 年追蹤期間 OKS 的邊際差異為 0·76（95% CI -0·08 至 1·59；p=0·076），有利於髕骨表面置換。在 20 年的追蹤期間，雖然不顯著，但 OKS、SF-12 和 EQ-5D-3L、再入院、小中或中級手術、髕骨相關手術、大手術和併發症的差異均有利於髕骨表面置換。 20 年時，重新表面治療組比未重新表面治療組獲得了顯著更多的調整後生命年 (QALY)（7·295 vs 6·884；差異 0·380，95% CI 0·061 至 0·700；p=0·020）。然而，假設死亡率沒有差異，敏感性分析的 QALY 差異較小（7·209 vs 6·964；差異 0·183，95% CI -0·034 至 0·400；p=0·10）。重新出現組別的再入院費用並沒有顯著降低，抵消了初級 TKR 的較高費用；因此，每位參與者的 20 年總體醫療保健費用相似（10 825 英鎊與 10 889 英鎊；差異 - 6 英鎊，95% CI - 721 英鎊至 708 英鎊；p=0·99）。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: There was no significant difference in primary outcome (OKS) or other clinical endpoints. However, as clinical differences tend to support patellar resurfacing, the resurfacing group had significantly higher QALYs. There was no difference in costs over the 20-year period, and patellar resurfacing had a 99% probability of being cost-effective at any threshold above £10 000 per QALY gained. The evidence is therefore weighted towards resurfacing being the approach of first choice.
abstract.textZh: 主要結局（OKS）或其他臨床終點沒有顯著差異。然而，由於臨床差異往往支持髕骨表面置換，因此表面置換組的 QALY 顯著較高。 20 年期間的成本沒有差異，在每 QALY 收益超過 10 000 英鎊的任何閾值下，髕骨表面置換術具有成本效益的可能性為 99%。因此，證據傾向於將表面重鋪作為首選方法。

articles.title: Diagnosis and treatment of postpartum haemorrhage: a race against time
articles.authors: Coomarasamy A, Devall AJ, Bell S, Sindhu KN, Mammoliti KM, Nausheen S, Ali-Masri H, Deneux-Tharaux C, et al.

abstract.text: Postpartum haemorrhage (PPH) is common, affecting an estimated 13% of women having vaginal birth and 31% of women having caesarean birth. Successful management of PPH requires early and accurate diagnosis and effective treatment. A systematic review found that subjective visual estimation of blood loss misses 52% of PPH diagnoses at vaginal birth (pooled sensitivity 48%, 95% CI 44-53), and probably more at caesarean birth. The WHO-International Federation of Gynecology and Obstetrics-International Confederation of Midwives consolidated guidelines on PPH therefore recommend objective quantification of blood loss with products such as a calibrated blood collection drape. When supported by a robust implementation strategy and a first-response treatment bundle, objective measurement of blood loss and monitoring of vital signs has been shown to diagnose PPH accurately and early, and improve clinical outcomes. Refractory PPH can progress to life-threatening PPH, which should be managed by a multidisciplinary team providing aggressive resuscitation and targeted treatment. Saving the life of a woman with excessive postpartum bleeding is a race against time. The six delays to avoid are: (1) in the diagnosis (by use of objective cumulative blood loss measurement and early trigger criteria), (2) in the first-response treatment (by authorising midwives to administer all components of a standardised bundle of interventions), (3) in the escalation (by use of explicit escalation criteria and red flags), (4) in the use of temporising measures (eg, non-pneumatic anti-shock garment), (5) in the identification and targeted management of any specific causes of bleeding, and (6) in the provision of blood and blood products. Quick actions to avoid these delays can mean the difference between life and death for a woman with PPH.
abstract.textZh: 產後出血 (PPH) 很常見，估計影響 13% 的自然產婦女和 31% 的剖腹產女性。 PPH 的成功治療需要早期、準確的診斷和有效的治療。一項系統性回顧發現，陰道分娩時主觀視覺估計失血量漏掉了 52% 的 PPH 診斷（匯總敏感性為 48%，95% CI 44-53），而剖腹產時的漏診率可能更高。因此，世界衛生組織、國際婦產科聯合會和國際助產士聯合會綜合了 PPH 指南，建議使用校準採血棉等產品對失血量進行客觀量化。在強有力的實施策略和第一反應治療方案的支持下，客觀測量失血量和監測生命徵像已被證明可以準確、早期地診斷 PPH，並改善臨床結果。難治性 PPH 可發展為危及生命的 PPH，應由多學科團隊進行管理，提供積極的復甦和有針對性的治療。挽救產後失血過多婦女的生命是一場與時間的賽跑。要避免的六種延誤是：（1）診斷（透過使用客觀累積失血量測量和早期觸發標準），（2）第一反應治療（透過授權助產士實施標準化幹預措施的所有組成部分），（3）升級（透過使用明確的升級標準和危險信號），（4）使用臨時措施（例如，非氣動抗休克服），（5）識別血液和有針對性對於患有 PPH 的女性來說，迅速採取行動避免這些延誤可能意味著生與死的差異。

articles.titleZh: 產後出血的診治：與時間賽跑

articles.title: Postpartum haemorrhage: epidemiology, consequences, and missed opportunities
articles.authors: Coomarasamy A, Sindhu KN, Gallos I, Periyathambi N, Price MJ, Yunas I, Qureshi Z, Muriithi FG, et al.

abstract.text: Excessive bleeding after childbirth, known as postpartum haemorrhage (PPH), can turn an uncomplicated birth into a catastrophe. Each year, PPH occurs in an estimated 27 million women worldwide-17 million after vaginal birth and 10 million during or after caesarean birth. An estimated 43 000 women die from PPH annually, translating to a death every 12 min. The pooled prevalence of PPH at vaginal birth is 12·6% (95% CI 10·1-15·2) and at caesarean birth 30·9% (95% credible interval 24·9-37·6), based on the conventional definition of PPH. Common causes of PPH are uterine atony, genital tract trauma, retained placenta, abnormal placentation, and coagulopathy. Risk factors include caesarean birth, multiple pregnancy, anaemia, high maternal BMI, previous PPH, female genital mutilation, sepsis, pre-eclampsia, macrosomia, and inadequate antenatal care. In addition to being the leading cause of maternal mortality worldwide, the consequences of PPH include serious morbidities such as severe anaemia, hysterectomy, organ failure, and long-term psychological trauma. The global economic burden of PPH is estimated at US$10·4 billion (95% credible interval $9·8-13·2 billion) annually, consisting of $3·6 billion ($3·2-6·2 billion) for health systems and $6·8 billion ($6·2-7·5 billion) for societies. Based on a rigorous review of the evidence, WHO has recently redefined PPH as objectively measured blood loss of at least 300 mL plus an abnormal haemodynamic sign, or objectively measured blood loss of at least 500 mL, whichever occurs first. This new definition prioritises early PPH diagnosis and treatment to avert life-threatening maternal outcomes. Comprehensive efforts to address missed opportunities in the prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of PPH are needed to improve outcomes. These efforts include addressing the unmet need for contraception, mitigating modifiable risks such as anaemia, avoiding caesarean sections that are not medically indicated, using effective single uterotonic prophylaxis for all births and combination prophylaxis for women at high risk of PPH, ensuring accurate and objective measurement of blood loss for early PPH diagnosis, and promptly implementing treatment with an evidence-based bundle. The PPH Roadmap (2023-30) provides a global framework for action.
abstract.textZh: 分娩後過度出血，稱為產後出血 (PPH)，可能會將原本不複雜的分娩變成一場災難。每年，全球估計有 2,700 萬名女性發生產後出血，其中 1,700 萬人是陰道分娩後，1,000 萬人是剖腹產期間或剖腹產後。據估計，每年有 43,000 名女性死於 PPH，即每 12 分鐘就有一人死亡。根據 PPH 的傳統定義，陰道分娩時 PPH 的總盛行率為 12·6%（95% CI 10·1-15·2），剖腹產時為 30·9%（95% 可信區間 24·9-37·6）。 PPH 的常見原因是子宮收縮無力、生殖道創傷、胎盤滯留、胎盤異常和凝血障礙。危險因子包括剖腹產、多胎妊娠、貧血、母親體重指數高、先前 PPH、女性生殖器切割、敗血症、子癇前症、巨大兒和產前護理不足。除了是全世界孕產婦死亡的主要原因之外，產後出血的後果還包括嚴重的發生率，例如嚴重貧血、子宮切除術、器官衰竭和長期心理創傷。 PPH 每年造成的全球經濟負擔估計為 10·40 億美元（95% 可信區間為 9·8-13·20 億美元），其中衛生系統 3·60 億美元（3·2-6·20 億美元），社會 6·80 億美元（6·2-7·50 億美元）。基於對證據的嚴格審查，世界衛生組織最近將 PPH 重新定義為客觀測量的失血量至少 300 mL 加異常血流動力學體徵，或客觀測量的失血量至少 500 mL，以先發生者為準。這項新定義優先考慮早期 PPH 診斷和治療，以避免危及生命的孕產婦結局。需要綜合努力解決 PPH 預防、診斷和治療方面錯失的機會，以改善結果。這些努力包括解決未滿足的避孕需求、減輕貧血等可改變的風險、避免無醫學指徵的剖腹產、對所有分娩使用有效的單次宮縮預防以及對產後出血高風險婦女進行聯合預防、確保準確、客觀地測量失血量以進行早期產後出血診斷，以及及時實施基於證據的捆綁治療。 PPH 路線圖 (2023-30) 提供了全球行動架構。

articles.titleZh: 產後出血：流行病學、後果和錯失的機會

articles.title: Prevention of postpartum haemorrhage: from evidence to implementation at scale
articles.authors: Gallos ID, Sindhu KN, Yunas I, Sobhy S, Mavrides E, Sheikh L, Escobar MF, Al-Beity FA, et al.

abstract.text: Postpartum haemorrhage (PPH) is a leading cause of maternal death. Preventing PPH can spare women from experiencing the trauma and risks of PPH, reduce the strain on overstretched health systems, and probably produce better outcomes than a strategy solely focused on PPH treatment. Prevention of PPH is often interpreted as provision of uterotonic drugs to contract the uterus at the time of childbirth. Although uterotonics are a central strategy for PPH prevention, several other approaches can prevent PPH or ameliorate its severity. These approaches include addressing the unmet need for contraception, remedying anaemia and other modifiable risk factors for PPH, optimising medical conditions that predispose to PPH, and tackling the rise in caesarean births in many countries. Effective delivery of preventive care requires early and regular antenatal care and planned birth at appropriately resourced health facilities. Social and behavioural change interventions for improving contraceptive provision and uptake, targeting adolescents, postpartum women, geographically remote communities, and families on low income, are a priority. Effective interventions to tackle anaemia include the management of heavy menstrual bleeding, pre-pregnancy or antenatal haemoglobin testing and oral or intravenous iron treatment, dietary improvements, and-on rare occasions-blood transfusion. Risk factors for PPH that need attention include high BMI, multiple pregnancy, gestational diabetes, pre-eclampsia, macrosomia, and several medical conditions. Caesarean births are associated with a substantial increase in PPH risk and should therefore only be done when medically indicated. A Cochrane network meta-analysis of 122 trials, with 121 931 women, found that the combinations of oxytocin plus misoprostol, or oxytocin plus ergometrine, were the most effective prophylaxis for PPH when given at the time of childbirth; however, these combinations had a higher risk of side-effects compared with single-drug prophylaxis. Oxytocin and carbetocin were the most effective single drugs for PPH prophylaxis, with minimal side-effects. Single uterotonic prophylaxis with either oxytocin or carbetocin is, therefore, recommended for routine prophylaxis. However, if oxytocin or carbetocin is not accessible, misoprostol is an alternative. Combination prophylaxis with oxytocin plus misoprostol can be considered for women at high risk of PPH. Ergometrine alone and oxytocin plus ergometrine combination are no longer recommended due to hypertension-related safety concerns. A robust implementation approach that engages various stakeholders to promote change, ensures the supply of quality-assured medicines and devices, provides training and support, and secures ongoing political and financial commitment is necessary to translate evidence into global impact.
abstract.textZh: 產後出血（PPH）是孕產婦死亡的主要原因。預防 PPH 可以使女性免受 PPH 帶來的創傷和風險，減輕過度緊張的衛生系統的壓力，並且可能比僅專注於 PPH 治療的策略產生更好的結果。預防產後出血通常被解釋為在分娩時提供子宮收縮藥物來收縮子宮。儘管子宮收縮劑是預防產後出血的核心策略，但其他幾種方法可以預防產後出血或減輕其嚴重程度。這些方法包括解決未滿足的避孕需求、治療貧血和其他可改變的產後出血風險因素、優化易患產後出血的醫療條件，以及解決許多國家剖腹產率上升的問題。有效提供預防性護理需要儘早、定期進行產前護理，並在資訊適當的衛生機構進行計劃生育。當務之急是針對青少年、產後婦女、偏遠社區和低收入家庭，採取社會和行為改變幹預措施，改善避孕藥具的提供和使用。解決貧血的有效幹預措施包括治療大量月經出血、孕前或產前血紅蛋白檢測、口服或靜脈注射補鐵治療、改善飲食以及在極少數情況下輸血。需要注意的 PPH 危險因子包括高 BMI、多胎妊娠、妊娠糖尿病、子癇前症、巨大兒和多種健康狀況。剖腹產與 PPH 風險大幅增加有關，因此只有在有醫學指徵時才應進行。 Cochrane 網路對 122 項試驗（涉及 121 931 名女性）進行的薈萃分析發現，在分娩時給予催產素加米索前列醇或催產素加麥角新鹼的組合是預防 PPH 最有效的方法；然而，與單一藥物預防相比，這些組合產生副作用的風險更高。催產素和卡貝縮宮素是預防 PPH 最有效的單一藥物，且副作用最小。因此，建議常規預防使用催產素或卡貝縮宮素進行單次宮縮預防。然而，如果無法獲得催產素或卡貝縮宮素，米索前列醇是一種替代選擇。對於 PPH 高風險女性，可以考慮使用催產素加米索前列醇合併預防。由於高血壓相關的安全問題，不再建議單獨使用麥角新鹼和催產素加麥角新鹼組合。需要採取強有力的實施方法，讓各利益相關者參與促進變革，確保供應有品質保證的藥品和設備，提供培訓和支持，並確保持續的政治和財政承諾，這對於將證據轉化為全球影響力至關重要。

articles.titleZh: 預防產後出血：從證據到大規模實施

articles.title: Cagrilintide-semaglutide (CagriSema) as an add-on to basal insulin in adults with type 2 diabetes (REIMAGINE 3): a randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, multicentre, phase 3 study
articles.authors: Rosenstock J, Billings LK, Gajria R, Giorgino F, Johansen NB, Klein KR, Thamattoor UK, Buse JB, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Basal insulin treatment for type 2 diabetes often results in inadequate glycaemic control and is associated with weight gain and increased risk of hypoglycaemia. We aimed to compare the efficacy and safety of a once per week combination of cagrilintide with semaglutide (CagriSema) versus placebo as an add-on to basal insulin in individuals with type 2 diabetes.
abstract.textZh: 2 型糖尿病的基礎胰島素治療通常會導致血糖控制不足，並與體重增加和低血糖風險增加有關。我們的目的是比較每週一次的卡格林肽與司馬魯肽 (CagriSema) 組合與安慰劑作為基礎胰島素的補充治療 2 型糖尿病患者的療效和安全性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This double-blind, parallel-group, randomised, controlled, phase 3a study (REIMAGINE 3) was done at 46 centres (university hospitals, health-care centres, research centres, and other clinical trial sites) in six countries (the USA, China, Japan, Serbia, Slovakia, and South Africa). Adults with type 2 diabetes (glycated haemoglobin [HbA1c] 7·0-10·5%) receiving stable once per day basal insulin with or without metformin were randomly assigned (2:2:1:1) to once per week subcutaneous cagrilintide 2·4 mg plus semaglutide 2·4 mg (hereafter cagrilintide-semaglutide [2·4 mg each]) or cagrilintide 1·0 mg plus semaglutide 1·0 mg (hereafter cagrilintide-semaglutide [1·0 mg each]) or dose-matched placebo (2·4 mg plus 2·4 mg or 1·0 mg plus 1·0 mg) for 40 weeks. Randomisation was stratified by HbA1c of less than 8·5% at screening (yes or no) and country (Japan; yes or no). Participants, care providers, investigators, and outcome assessors were masked within each dose level to treatment allocation, with active treatments visually identical to placebo. The primary endpoint was mean HbA1c change (percentage points) from baseline to week 40 in all participants randomly assigned to treatment; secondary endpoints included change in bodyweight and safety, including hypoglycaemia. This trial was registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06323161) and is complete.
abstract.textZh: 這項雙盲、平行組、隨機、對照 3a 期研究 (REIMAGINE 3) 在 6 個國家（美國、中國、日本、塞爾維亞、斯洛伐克和南非）的 46 個中心（大學醫院、醫療保健中心、研究中心和其他臨床試驗地點）進行。患有第 2 型糖尿病的成年人（糖化血紅蛋白 [HbA1c] 7·0-10·5%）每天接受一次穩定的基礎胰島素聯合或不聯合二甲雙胍，被隨機分配（2:2:1:1）每週一次皮下注射卡格林肽 2·4 mg 加索馬魯肽 2·4 mg（以下稱格林肽 10-10 mg）加索馬魯肽 1·0 mg（以下稱為卡格林肽-索馬魯肽[各 1·0 mg]）或劑量匹配安慰劑（2·4 mg 加 2·4 mg 或 1·0 mg 加 1·0 mg），持續 40 週。隨機分組根據篩選時 HbA1c 低於 8·5%（是或否）和國家（日本；是或否）進行分層。參與者、護理提供者、研究人員和結果評估人員在治療分配的每個劑量水平中都被隱藏，積極治療在視覺上與安慰劑相同。主要終點是隨機分配接受治療的所有參與者從基線到第 40 週的平均 HbA1c 變化（百分點）；次要終點包括體重變化和安全性，包括低血糖。該試驗已在 ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06323161) 註冊並已完成。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between March 26 and Nov 29, 2024, we screened 340 individuals and 274 were included and randomly assigned to cagrilintide-semaglutide (2·4 mg each; n=90), cagrilintide-semaglutide (1·0 mg each; n=93), or placebo (pooled; n=91). Mean baseline HbA1c was 8·8% (SD 1·0), 159 (58%) participants were male, and 115 (42%) were female. Mean HbA1c reductions were significantly greater with cagrilintide-semaglutide (2·4 mg each -2·33% [SE 0·08] and 1·0 mg each -2·10% [0·08]) versus placebo (-0·66% [0·11]) at week 40, using the efficacy estimand (estimated treatment difference for cagrilintide-semaglutide [2·4 mg each] vs placebo -1·68 percentage points [95% CI -1·95 to -1·41], p<0·0001; for cagrilintide-semaglutide [1·0 mg each] vs placebo -1·44 percentage points [95% CI -1·71 to -1·17], p<0·0001). Cagrilintide-semaglutide provided bodyweight reductions of 10-12%. Adverse events were reported by 72 (80%) of 90 participants receiving cagrilintide-semaglutide (2·4 mg each), 66 (71%) of 93 receiving cagrilintide-semaglutide (1·0 mg each), and 65 (71%) of 91 receiving placebo, and were mostly mild or moderate gastrointestinal disorders. No severe hypoglycaemia was reported. There was one death in the cagrilintide-semaglutide (1·0 mg each) group not related to treatment (due to malignancy).
abstract.textZh: 2024 年 3 月 26 日至 11 月 29 日期間，我們篩選了 340 名受試者，其中 274 名受試者被隨機分配至卡格林肽-司馬魯肽組（每組 2·4 mg；n=90）、卡格林肽-司馬魯肽組（每組 1·0 mg；n=90）、卡格林肽-司馬魯肽組（每組 1·0 mg；n=93）或安慰劑。平均基線 HbA1c 為 8·8% (SD 1·0)，159 名參與者 (58%) 為男性，115 名參與者 (42%) 為女性。使用療效估計值（卡格林肽-索馬魯肽[每種 2·4 mg]的估計治療差異），第 40 週時卡格林肽-索馬魯肽（每種 2·4 mg -2·33% [SE 0·08] 和每種 1·0 mg -2·10% [0·08]）的平均值高於 HbA1c 1·6-6與安慰劑 -1·68 個百分點 [95% CI -1·95 至 -1·41]，p<0·0001；卡格林肽-索馬魯肽 [各 1·0 mg] 與安慰劑 -1·44 個百分點 [95% CI -1·71 至 -1·17]，p<0·0001）。卡格里林肽-索馬魯肽使體重減輕了 10-12%。接受卡格林肽-索馬魯肽（每次 2·4 mg）的 90 名參與者中有 72 名（80%）報告了不良事件，接受卡格林肽-索馬魯肽（每次 1·0 mg）的 93 名參與者中有 66 名（71%）報告了不良事件，接受安慰劑的 91 名參與者中有 66 名（71%）報告了不良事件，接受安慰劑的 91 名參與者中有 65%）。沒有嚴重低血糖的報告。卡格林肽-索馬魯肽（各 1·0 mg）組中有 1 例與治療無關的死亡（由於惡性腫瘤）。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Cagrilintide-semaglutide at doses of 2·4 mg each and 1·0 mg each met the primary endpoint, with statistically significant and clinically relevant HbA1c reductions versus placebo when added to basal insulin-treated type 2 diabetes. These reductions were accompanied by robust bodyweight reduction and no additional risk of hypoglycaemia. The safety profile was consistent with that of the GLP-1 receptor agonist class and previous safety data for cagrilintide. Findings support the use of cagrilintide-semaglutide as an add-on to once per day basal insulin to significantly improve glycaemic control.
abstract.textZh: 卡格林肽-司馬魯肽劑量分別為 2·4 mg 和 1·0 mg 達到主要終點，與安慰劑相比，當添加到基礎胰島素治療的 2 型糖尿病中時，具有統計學意義和臨床相關的 HbA1c 降低。這些減少伴隨著體重的大幅減少，並且沒有額外的低血糖風險。安全性與 GLP-1 受體激動劑類的安全性以及卡格林肽先前的安全性數據一致。研究結果支持使用卡格林肽-司馬魯肽作為每日一次基礎胰島素的附加藥物，可顯著改善血糖控制。

abstract.label: FUNDING
abstract.text: Novo Nordisk.
abstract.textZh: 諾和諾德。

articles.titleZh: 卡格林肽索馬魯肽 (CagriSema) 作為基礎胰島素的補充治療成人 2 型糖尿病 (REIMAGINE 3)：一項隨機、雙盲、安慰劑對照、多中心 3 期研究

articles.title: Advances in Multiple Sclerosis
articles.authors: Hauser SL

abstract.text: Multiple sclerosis is a chronic autoimmune disorder that affects the central nervous system, causing episodes of neurologic dysfunction and often gradual disease progression. The immune system primarily targets myelin, the protective covering of nerve fibers, leading to inflammation and damage, and secondary neurodegeneration is a major cause of long-term disability. Common symptoms include vision problems, sensory disturbances, muscle weakness, balance difficulties, and bladder dysfunction. Important advances in treatment have improved outcomes in patients with relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis, particularly through highly effective immune-modifying therapies such as CD20-targeting monoclonal antibodies. However, treatment options for progressive forms remain limited, which highlights the need for therapies that can prevent progression and promote myelin repair. Comprehensive symptom management and lifestyle support are also essential to maintaining quality of life and reducing disability.
abstract.textZh: 多發性硬化症是一種慢性自體免疫疾病，會影響中樞神經系統，導致神經功能障礙發作，通常會導致疾病逐漸進展。免疫系統主要針對髓鞘（神經纖維的保護層），導致發炎和損傷，繼發性神經退化是長期殘疾的主要原因。常見症狀包括視力問題、感覺障礙、肌肉無力、平衡困難和膀胱功能障礙。治療方面的重要進展改善了復發型多發性硬化症患者的預後，特別是透過高效的免疫修飾療法，例如針對 CD20 的單株抗體。然而，進展型形式的治療選擇仍然有限，這凸顯了對能夠預防進展和促進髓鞘修復的療法的需求。全面的症狀管理和生活方式支持對於維持生活品質和減少殘疾也至關重要。

articles.titleZh: 多發性硬化症的進展

articles.title: Rituximab versus Ocrelizumab in Newly Diagnosed Relapsing Multiple Sclerosis
articles.authors: Torkildsen Ø, Brustad HK, Høgestøl EA, Alstadhaug KB, Bhan A, Flemmen HØ, Habbestad A, Høglund RAA, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Anti-CD20 monoclonal antibodies are effective for relapsing multiple sclerosis. However, data from head-to-head trials are lacking.
abstract.textZh: 抗CD20單株抗體可有效治療復發性多發性硬化症。然而，缺乏頭對頭試驗的數據。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this phase 3, multicenter, double-blind, noninferiority trial, we randomly assigned adults with newly diagnosed relapsing multiple sclerosis and recent disease activity in a 3:2 ratio to receive rituximab or ocrelizumab every 6 months for 24 months. The primary end point was the absence of new or enlarging lesions on T2-weighted magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) from month 6 to month 24. Noninferiority was defined as a lower limit of the 95% confidence interval for the risk difference (rituximab minus ocrelizumab) of greater than or equal to -10 percentage points. Secondary end points included efficacy and safety.
abstract.textZh: 在這項 3 期、多中心、雙盲、非劣效性試驗中，我們以 3:2 的比例隨機分配新診斷的複發性多發性硬化症和近期疾病活動的成人，每 6 個月接受利妥昔單抗或 ocrelizumab 治療，持續 24 個月。主要終點是從第 6 個月到第 24 個月，T2 加權磁振造影 (MRI) 沒有出現新的或擴大的病灶。非劣效性定義為風險差異（利妥昔單抗減去奧瑞珠單抗）的 95% 信賴區間下限大於或等於 -10 個百分點。次要終點包括療效和安全性。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 218 participants underwent randomization; 216 received treatment (132 assigned to the rituximab group and 84 assigned to the ocrelizumab group). Between months 6 and 24, the estimated probability of having no new or enlarging lesions detected on T2-weighted MRI was 92.2% with rituximab and 94.8% with ocrelizumab, corresponding to a risk difference of -2.6 percentage points (95% confidence interval, -9.4 to 4.3), which met the prespecified noninferiority criterion. Relapse rates, disability outcomes, and cognitive-performance profiles appeared to be similar in the two groups. Infections were more common in the rituximab group than in the ocrelizumab group (in 82% vs. 69% of participants), although the percentage of participants with serious adverse events was similar in the two groups (8% and 7%, respectively).
abstract.textZh: 共有 218 名參與者接受了隨機分組； 216 人接受了治療（132 人分配到利妥昔單抗組，84 人分配到奧瑞珠單抗組）。第 6 個月至 24 個月期間，T2 加權 MRI 未檢測到新病灶或擴大病灶的估計概率，利妥昔單抗組為 92.2%，奧瑞珠單抗組為 94.8%，相當於 -2.6 個百分點的風險差異（95% 置信區間，-9.4 至 4.3），符合預先指定的非劣效性標準。兩組的復發率、殘障結果和認知表現似乎相似。利妥昔單抗組的感染比奧瑞珠單抗組更常見（參與者分別為 82% 和 69%），儘管兩組中出現嚴重不良事件的參與者比例相似（分別為 8% 和 7%）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: In participants with newly diagnosed relapsing multiple sclerosis and recent disease activity, rituximab was noninferior to ocrelizumab in suppressing disease activity as detected by MRI from 6 to 24 months, with a similar incidence of serious adverse events. (Funded by the Research Council of Norway and others; OVERLORD-MS ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04578639; EudraCT number, 2020-001205-23; EU Clinical Trials Register number, 2024-510716-71-00.).
abstract.textZh: 在新診斷的複發性多發性硬化症和近期疾病活動的參與者中，根據 6 至 24 個月的 MRI 檢測，利妥昔單抗在抑制疾病活動方面不遜色於 ocrelizumab，且嚴重不良事件的發生率相似。 （由挪威研究委員會和其他機構資助；OVERLORD-MS ClinicalTrials.gov 編號，NCT04578639；EudraCT 編號，2020-001205-23；歐盟臨床試驗註冊編號，2024-510716-71-00。）。

articles.titleZh: 利妥昔單抗與 Ocrelizumab 治療新診斷的複發性多發性硬化症

articles.title: Adjuvant Pembrolizumab plus Belzutifan for Renal-Cell Carcinoma
articles.authors: Choueiri TK, Motzer RJ, Karam JA, Yip W, Suárez C, Ye D, He Z, Caglevic C, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Adjuvant pembrolizumab improves disease-free and overall survival among patients with resected clear-cell renal-cell carcinoma. The hypoxia-inducible factor 2α inhibitor belzutifan has activity in advanced disease. Adjuvant pembrolizumab with belzutifan may further improve outcomes in patients with clear-cell renal-cell carcinoma at increased risk for recurrence.
abstract.textZh: 輔助帕博利珠單抗可改善切除的透明細胞腎細胞癌患者的無疾病存活率和總存活率。缺氧誘導因子 2α 抑制劑 belzutifan 對晚期疾病具有活性。派姆單抗合併 Belzutifan 輔助治療可能會進一步改善復發風險增加的透明細胞腎細胞癌患者的預後。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this phase 3, double-blind trial, we randomly assigned participants in a 1:1 ratio to receive intravenous pembrolizumab at a dose of 400 mg every 6 weeks (≤9 doses) and either daily oral belzutifan at a dose of 120 mg (pembrolizumab-belzutifan) or placebo (pembrolizumab-placebo) for up to 1 year. The primary end point was disease-free survival as assessed by the investigator; secondary end points included overall survival and safety.
abstract.textZh: 在這項3期雙盲試驗中，我們以1:1的比例隨機分配參與者接受靜脈注射pembrolizumab，劑量為每6週400 mg（≤9劑量），並每日口服belzutifan，劑量為120 mg（pembrolizumab-belzutifan）或安慰劑（pembrolizumab-placebo），持續長達1年。主要終點是研究者評估的無疾病存活期；次要終點包括總體存活率和安全性。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 921 participants were assigned to receive pembrolizumab-belzutifan and 920 were assigned to receive pembrolizumab-placebo. The median time from randomization to the data-cutoff date (August 23, 2025) was 28.4 months (range, 15.0 to 40.1). Disease-free survival was significantly higher with pembrolizumab-belzutifan than with pembrolizumab-placebo (hazard ratio for disease recurrence or death, 0.72; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.59 to 0.87; two-sided P<0.001); the estimated 24-month disease-free survival was 80.7% and 73.7%, respectively. At this interim analysis with 29% of the final-analysis events observed, overall survival did not differ significantly between the groups (hazard ratio for death, 0.78; 95% CI, 0.51 to 1.19; two-sided P = 0.24); the estimated 24-month overall survival was 96.2% with pembrolizumab-belzutifan and 95.7% with pembrolizumab-placebo. Adverse events of grade 3 or higher occurred in 52.1% of the participants who received pembrolizumab-belzutifan and in 30.2% of those who received pembrolizumab-placebo.

articles.title: Angiography-Derived Fractional Flow Reserve to Guide PCI
articles.authors: Fearon WF, Jeremias A, Witberg G, Al-Lamee R, Cohen DJ, Kaki A, Sharma RP, Yeh RW, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Assessing intermediate coronary lesions with an intracoronary pressure wire improves clinical outcomes in patients undergoing cardiac catheterization and percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI). However, clinical use of pressure-wire-based physiological assessment remains low. Measurement of fractional flow reserve (FFR) derived from coronary angiographic images alone correlates well with pressure-wire-based FFR measurements and may simplify procedures, but its effect on clinical outcomes is unknown.
abstract.textZh: 使用冠狀動脈內壓力絲評估中間冠狀動脈病變可改善接受心導管插入術和經皮冠狀動脈介入治療 (PCI) 的患者的臨床結果。然而，基於壓力線的生理評估的臨床使用仍然很少。僅從冠狀動脈造影影像得出的血流儲備分數 (FFR) 測量與基於壓力線的 FFR 測量具有良好的相關性，並且可以簡化程序，但其對臨床結果的影響尚不清楚。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this international noninferiority trial, we randomly assigned patients undergoing coronary angiography who were found to have at least one intermediate coronary stenosis to physiological assessment with measurements derived from angiographic images (FFRangio) or with pressure-wire-based measurements. The primary end point was a composite of death, myocardial infarction, or unplanned, clinically indicated coronary revascularization at 1 year. The noninferiority margin was 3.5 percentage points.
abstract.textZh: 在這項國際非劣效性試驗中，我們隨機分配接受冠狀動脈造影的患者，這些患者被發現至少有一個中間冠狀動脈狹窄，以通過血管造影圖像（FFRangio）或基於壓力線的測量進行生理評估。主要終點是 1 年時死亡、心肌梗塞或計劃外、臨床指示的冠狀動脈血運重建的複合終點。非劣效幅度為 3.5 個百分點。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 1930 patients were randomly assigned to physiological assessment with FFRangio (FFRangio group; 965 patients) or a pressure-wire-based approach (pressure-wire group; 965 patients). The mean age of the patients was 68.4 years, and 25.0% of the patients were women. At 1 year, a primary end-point event had occurred in 64 patients (Kaplan-Meier estimate, 6.9%) in the FFRangio group and 65 patients (Kaplan-Meier estimate, 7.1%) in the pressure-wire group (hazard ratio, 0.98; 95% confidence interval, 0.70 to 1.39; difference, -0.2 percentage points; upper boundary of the one-sided 97.5% confidence interval, 2.1 percentage points; P<0.001 for noninferiority). There were no apparent differences between the groups with respect to the incidence of bleeding, acute kidney injury, or procedure-related adverse events.
abstract.textZh: 共有 1930 名患者被隨機分配接受 FFRangio 生理評估（FFRangio 組；965 名患者）或基於壓力線的方法（壓力線組；965 名患者）。患者的平均年齡為68.4歲，其中25.0%的患者為女性。第 1 年時，FFRangio 組有 64 名患者（Kaplan-Meier 估計，6.9%）和壓線組有 65 名患者（Kaplan-Meier 估計，7.1%）發生主要終點事件（風險比，0.98；95% 置信區間，0.70 至 1.39；個百分點；P<0.001 為非劣效性）。各組在出血、急性腎損傷或手術相關不良事件的發生率方面沒有明顯差異。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among patients with intermediate coronary-artery lesions undergoing physiological assessment in the cardiac catheterization laboratory, an angiography-guided strategy involving FFRangio was noninferior to a pressure-wire-guided strategy with respect to a composite end point of death, myocardial infarction, or unplanned clinically indicated coronary revascularization at 1 year. (Funded by CathWorks; ALL-RISE ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05893498.).
abstract.textZh: 在心導管實驗室接受生理學評估的中間冠狀動脈病變患者中，涉及 FFRangio 的血管造影引導策略在 1 年時死亡、心肌梗塞或非計劃臨床指示冠狀動脈血運重建的複合終點方面不劣於壓力導絲引導策略。 （由 CathWorks 資助；ALL-RISE ClinicalTrials.gov 編號，NCT05893498。）。

articles.title: Angiography-Based Physiology to Guide Coronary Revascularization
articles.authors: Daemen J, van der Eijk JA, Barbierato M, Byrne RA, Canova P, De Maria GL, Van Belle E, Amat-Santos I, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Current society guidelines recommend physiological assessment of intermediate coronary lesions to guide revascularization. Data regarding revascularization guided by vessel fractional flow reserve (vFFR), derived from three-dimensional quantitative coronary angiography without the need for a pressure wire or hyperemic agent, as compared with pressure-wire-based fractional flow reserve (FFR), are lacking.
abstract.textZh: 目前的學會指南建議對中間冠狀動脈病變進行生理評估以指導血管重建。與基於壓力線的血流儲備分數（FFR）相比，缺乏關於由血管血流儲備分數（vFFR）引導的血運重建的數據，該血運重建源自三維定量冠狀動脈造影，無需壓力線或充血劑。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted an international, open-label, randomized, noninferiority trial at 37 sites in Europe. Patients with intermediate coronary-artery lesions (diameter stenosis of 30 to 80%) who presented with chronic or acute coronary syndromes were randomly assigned in a 1:1 ratio to undergo either vFFR-guided or FFR-guided revascularization of the intermediate coronary-artery lesions. The primary end point was a composite of death from any cause, any myocardial infarction, or any revascularization at 1 year. The noninferiority margin was 3.0 percentage points.
abstract.textZh: 我們在歐洲 37 個地點進行了一項國際性、開放標籤、隨機、非劣效性試驗。患有慢性或急性冠狀動脈症候群的中間冠狀動脈病變（直徑狹窄30%至80%）的患者以1:1的比例隨機分配，接受vFFR引導或FFR引導的中間冠狀動脈病變血運重建。主要終點是一年內全因死亡、任何心肌梗塞或任何血管重建的複合終點。非劣效幅度為 3.0 個百分點。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The primary end point was assessed in 1116 patients in the vFFR group and 1095 in the FFR group. The mean age of the patients was 67 years, 24.3% were women, 18.7% presented with an acute coronary syndrome, and 26.6% had diabetes mellitus. At 1 year, a primary end-point event had occurred in 80 patients (Kaplan-Meier estimate, 7.5%) in the vFFR group and in 79 patients (Kaplan-Meier estimate, 7.5%) in the FFR group (risk difference, -0.02 percentage points; 95% confidence interval, -2.25 to 2.21; P = 0.004 for noninferiority). The incidence of serious adverse events appeared to be similar in the two groups.

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among patients with intermediate coronary lesions, vFFR-guided revascularization was noninferior to FFR-guided revascularization with respect to a composite of death, myocardial infarction, or revascularization at 1 year. (Funded by Pie Medical Imaging and Siemens Healthineers; FAST III ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04931771.).

articles.title: [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide versus everolimus for gastroenteropancreatic neuroendocrine tumours (COMPETE): a phase 3, multicentre, randomised, open-label, superiority trial
articles.authors: Walter T, Jann H, Ansquer C, Deshayes E, Garcia-Carbonero R, Teulé A, Baum RP, Verberne HJ, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Peptide receptor radionuclide and targeted therapy are both approved treatment options for patients with metastatic gastroenteropancreatic neuroendocrine tumours (GEP NETs), but clinical evidence for preferred sequencing is scarce. The COMPETE trial evaluated the efficacy and harms of peptide receptor radionuclide therapy ([177Lu]Lu-edotreotide) versus targeted molecular therapy (everolimus) in patients with advanced, progressive, somatostatin receptor-positive GEP NETs.
abstract.textZh: 勝肽受體放射性核素和標靶治療都是已核准的轉移性胃腸胰神經內分泌腫瘤（GEP NET）患者的治療選擇，但首選定序的臨床證據很少。 COMPETE 試驗評估了勝肽受體放射性核素治療（[177Lu]Lu-edotreotide）與標靶分子治療（依維莫司）對晚期、進行性生長抑素受體陽性 GEP NET 患者的療效和危害。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This phase 3, open-label, superiority trial included patients aged 18 years or older with treatment-naive or previously treated unresectable or metastatic (or both) grade 1-2 GEP NETs. Patients were enrolled from 49 specialist neuroendocrine tumour treatment centres across 14 countries in Africa, Europe, North America, and Oceania and randomised (2:1) to intravenous [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide (7·5 ± 0·7 GBq every 3 months, maximum four cycles) or oral everolimus (10 mg/day) for up to 30 months. Random assignment was via a central, web-based randomisation system (block size of 6) and stratified by primary tumour origin and previous therapy. The primary endpoint was progression-free survival, assessed via blinded independent central review in all randomly assigned patients at 30 months. Harms were assessed in all enrolled patients who received at least one dose of a study drug. This study was registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT03049189) and is no longer recruiting.
abstract.textZh: 這項 3 期開放標籤優效性試驗納入了年齡在 18 歲或以上且未接受過治療或既往接受過不可切除或轉移性（或兩者兼有）1-2 級 GEP NET 治療的患者。患者來自非洲、歐洲、北美和大洋洲 14 個國家的 49 個神經內分泌腫瘤專科治療中心，並隨機 (2:1) 接受靜脈注射 [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide（每 3 個月 7·5 ± 0·7 GBq，最多四個週期）或口服依維莫天司（10 mg/VL）治療，療程長達 30 mg 10 mg/309）。隨機分配是透過基於網路的中央隨機分配系統（區塊大小為 6）進行的，並按原發腫瘤起源和先前治療進行分層。主要終點是無惡化存活期，在 30 個月時透過盲法獨立集中審查對所有隨機分配的患者進行評估。對所有接受至少一劑研究藥物的入組患者進行危害評估。該研究已在 ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT03049189) 註冊，並且不再招募。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between April 13, 2017, and June 20, 2022, 324 patients were enrolled and 309 patients (including 168 [54%] male patients and 141 [46%] female patients) were randomly assigned to treatment: 207 to the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 102 to the everolimus group. The median follow-up for progression-free survival was 27·5 months (IQR 19·6-30·4) for the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 21·2 months (8·9-29·4) for the everolimus group. Median progression-free survival was significantly longer with [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide versus everolimus (23·9 months [95% CI 18·7-30·0] vs 14·1 months [9·2-20·9]; stratified hazard ratio 0·67 [95% CI 0·48-0·95]; p=0·022). Treatment-related adverse events occurred in 178 (82%) of 217 patients in the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 96 (97%) of 99 patients in the everolimus group. 40 (18%) patients in the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group and 40 (40%) in the everolimus group had at least one treatment-related grade 3-4 adverse event. The most common treatment-related adverse events in the [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide group were diarrhoea and nausea (both 79 [36%] patients) and asthenia (66 [33%] patients), whereas those in the everolimus group were diarrhoea (45 [45%] patients), asthenia (36 [36%] patients), and anaemia (27 [27%] patients). No treatment-related deaths occurred in either study group.
abstract.textZh: 107年4月13日至2022年6月20日期間， [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide 組的中位無惡化存活期追蹤為 27·5 個月 (IQR 19·6-30·4)，依維莫司組為 21·2 個月 (8·9-29·4)。 [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide 與依維莫司相比，中位無惡化存活期顯著延長（23·9 個月 [95% CI 18·7-30·0] vs 14·1 個月 [9·2-20·9]；分層風險比 0·67 [95% CI 0·20-20·9]； [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide 組 217 例患者中有 178 例 (82%) 發生治療相關不良事件，依維莫司組 99 例患者中有 96 例 (97%) 發生治療相關不良事件。 [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide 組中有 40 名患者 (18%) 和依維莫司組有 40 名患者 (40%) 發生至少一項與治療相關的 3-4 級不良事件。 [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide組最常見的治療相關不良事件是腹瀉和噁心（均為79例[36%]患者）和乏力（66[33%]例患者），而依維莫司組則為腹瀉（45例[45%]例患者）、乏力（36例[36%]27%。兩個研究組均未發生與治療相關的死亡。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide led to statistically significant and clinically meaningful improvements in progression-free survival. Efficacy and harms results support the use of [177Lu]Lu-edotreotide in early lines of therapy in patients with advanced, progressive GEP NETs.

articles.title: Learning disability register enrolment in young people in England: Cohort Study, 2015-2023
articles.authors: Shah R, Horridge K, Saxena S, Hargreaves DS, Petersen I

abstract.text: Background Learning disability registers in UK primary care support proactive care, but under-identification remains substantial. The 2019 NHS Long Term Plan introduced targets to increase enrolment. Aim To estimate prevalence and rates of new registration to learning disability registers among young people aged 14-24 years in England and examine changes following the introduction of national targets. Design and setting Population-based open cohort study using routinely collected primary care data from general practices in England contributing to the Clinical Practice Research Datalink (CPRD) Aurum database, 2015-2023. Method Young people aged 14-24 years who had been registered at least 6 months were included. Annual rates of new registration per 10,000 person-years at risk (PYAR) and recorded prevalence were calculated, stratified by age, sex, region, and year. Results Between 2015 and 2023, 11,776 young people were first recorded on a learning disability register. Rates of new registration increased in 2020-2021 across ages and sexes, peaking at 15.8 per 10,000 PYAR in males aged 14-17 years and 8.4 per 10,000 in females before returning to pre-2019 levels by 2023. Recorded prevalence remained low overall (0.03%-0.5%; 3.6-52.7 per 10,000) but increased among those aged 18-24 years, with eight-to-ten-fold rises between 2015 and 2023. Prevalence was higher in males (rate ratios 1.7-1.8, 95% confidence interval 1.6-1.9). Conclusion National targets coincided with a temporary rise in enrolment, but identification remains below expected prevalence. Sustained policy focus and systematic identification and coding by practices are needed to ensure equitable access to preventive care during the transition to adulthood.
abstract.textZh: 背景 英國初級保健中登記的學習障礙支持主動護理，但識別不足的情況仍然嚴重。 2019 年 NHS 長期計劃引入了增加入學率的目標。目的 估計英格蘭 14-24 歲年輕人新登記學習障礙登記的盛行率和比率，並檢視引入國家目標後的變化。設計和設置基於人群的開放隊列研究，使用從英格蘭一般實踐中定期收集的初級保健數據，這些數據有助於臨床實踐研究數據鏈（CPRD）Aurum數據庫，2015-2023年。方法 納入登記時間不少於6個月的14-24歲青少年。按年齡、性別、地區和年份分層，計算每 10,000 人年風險 (PYAR) 的年新登記率和記錄的盛行率。結果 2015 年至 2023 年間，有 11,776 名年輕人首次被記錄在學習障礙登記冊上。 2020 年至 2021 年，不同年齡和性別的新登記率有所增加，14-17 歲男性的峰值為每 10,000 人每年 15.8 人，女性為每 10,000 人 8.4 人，然後到 2023 年恢復到 2019 年之前的水平。整體記錄的盛行率仍然較低（0.03%-0.5%；每 10,000 歲女性 3.6-52.7 人）。 10,000），但在 18-24 歲人群中有所增加，2015 年至 2023 年間增加了 8 至 10 倍。男性的盛行率較高（比率為 1.7-1.8，95% 信賴區間為 1.6-1.9）。結論 國家目標與入學率暫時上升相吻合，但識別率仍低於預期盛行率。需要持續的政策重點以及實踐的系統識別和編碼，以確保在向成年過渡期間公平獲得預防性護理。

articles.authors: Sutherland D, Costello B, Chauhan U, Flynn S, Gray KM, Parsons J, Spencer R, Crawford H

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: People with intellectual disabilities (referred to as learning disabilities in the United Kingdom) face considerable health inequalities. One attempt to address these in England has been through incentivising General Practices to complete annual health checks with people with a learning disability aged 14 or over.
abstract.textZh: 智障者（在英國稱為學習障礙）面臨相當大的健康不平等。在英格蘭，解決這些問題的一項嘗試是透過激勵全科醫生對 14 歲或以上有學習障礙的人完成年度健康檢查。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: We aimed to examine recent trends in learning disability registers and the uptake of learning disability annual health checks in England.
