abstract.textZh: 對公開資料的二次分析。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We compiled and analysed NHS England data on the learning disabilities annual health check scheme from January 2022 to November 2025.
abstract.textZh: 我們整理並分析了 2022 年 1 月至 2025 年 11 月英國 NHS 有關學習障礙年度健康檢查計劃的數據。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The number of 14-17year-olds and adults on learning disability registers increased during this period by 30.49% and 14.53%, respectively. The most recent estimates indicate that around 0.588% of patients are on learning disability registers and 0.526% are also aged ≥14-years-old and eligible for annual health checks. The uptake of annual health checks increased slightly from 68.08% to 71.58% among 14-17-year-olds, and from 79.07% to 80.71% among adults. Uptake is lowest in the South-West and East of England, and highest in London, but is similar across deciles of patient deprivation and practice size.
abstract.textZh: 在此期間，學習障礙登記的14-17歲青少年和成人人數分別增加了30.49%和14.53%。最新估計表明，大約 0.588% 的患者被登記在冊，0.526% 的患者年齡≥14 歲，有資格接受年度健康檢查。 14-17歲青少年年度健康檢查比例從68.08%小幅上升至71.58%，成人年度健康檢查比例從79.07%小幅上升至80.71%。英格蘭西南部和東部地區的採用率最低，倫敦最高，但在患者剝奪程度和診所規模方面的情況相似。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Ascertainment of people with a learning disability by primary care services appears to be improving but remains between a third and a quarter of prevalence estimates. The uptake of annual health checks among 14-17-year-olds continues to lag behind that of adults.
abstract.textZh: 初級保健服務對有學習障礙的人的發現似乎正在改善，但患病率仍處於估計值的三分之一到四分之一之間。 14-17 歲青少年每年進行健康檢查的比例仍落後於成年人。

articles.titleZh: 學習障礙（智障）年度健康檢查的接受率差異

articles.title: Recording of Pharmacy First consultations in general practice records in England: an observational study of the service's first year using OpenSAFELY
articles.authors: Kingsley VJ, Wiedemann M, Wood C, Curtis HJ, Green A, Fisher L, Andrews CD, Evans D, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Pharmacy First, a national community pharmacy service, launched in January 2024 to improve access to primary care for patients with minor conditions facing backlogs caused by the COVID-19 pandemic. Pharmacies are required to share details about their consultations with general practices.
abstract.textZh: Pharmacy First 是一項全國社區藥局服務，於 2024 年 1 月啟動，旨在改善因 COVID-19 大流行而面臨積壓的輕症患者獲得初級保健的機會。藥局必須分享其與全科診所諮詢的詳細資訊。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To describe how and what clinical activity was recorded in general practice during the first year of the Pharmacy First service.
abstract.textZh: 描述在 Pharmacy First 服務的第一年期間，在一般實踐中記錄的臨床活動的方式和內容。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: With the approval of NHS England, we conducted a retrospective cohort study between 31 January 2024 and 30 January 2025 using OpenSAFELY-TPP, a secure platform for analysing pseudonymised GP records from practices using TPP software.
abstract.textZh: 經英國 NHS 批准，我們在 2024 年 1 月 31 日至 2025 年 1 月 30 日期間使用 OpenSAFELY-TPP 進行了一項回顧性隊列研究，OpenSAFELY-TPP 是一個安全平台，用於分析使用 TPP 軟體的診所的假名全科醫生記錄。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: We described patient demographics, Pharmacy First consultation trends, and the clinical conditions and medications coded with the consultations.
abstract.textZh: 我們描述了患者人口統計、Pharmacy First 諮詢趨勢以及諮詢中編碼的臨床狀況和藥物。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 402,165 Pharmacy First consultations were recorded for 340,710 patients from a general population of 26,142,380 registered patients in OpenSAFELY-TPP. Acute pharyngitis (28.9%) and uncomplicated urinary tract infection (28%) were the most frequently recorded conditions. By January 2025, 36.3% of recorded Pharmacy First consultations had a clinical condition, medication, or both. Females, younger adults and those living in more deprived areas were observed more often in Pharmacy First records compared to the general population.
abstract.textZh: 在 OpenSAFELY-TPP 的 26,142,380 名註冊患者中，共記錄了 340,710 名患者的 402,165 次藥房首次諮詢。急性咽炎（28.9%）和單純性泌尿道感染（28%）是最常見的情況。到 2025 年 1 月，記錄的 Pharmacy First 諮詢中有 36.3% 涉及臨床狀況、藥物或兩者兼而有之。與一般人群相比，女性、年輕人和生活在較貧困地區的人在 Pharmacy First 記錄中出現的頻率更高。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Increasing recording of the Pharmacy First community pharmacy service was observed in general practice records during its first year, particularly among younger and more deprived populations. However, variation in structured recording of consultation details may limit evaluation.
abstract.textZh: 在第一年的全科醫療記錄中觀察到「藥局第一」社區藥局服務的記錄不斷增加，特別是在年輕和貧困人群中。然而，諮詢細節的結構化記錄的變化可能會限制評估。

articles.titleZh: 英格蘭全科醫療記錄中的藥房首次諮詢記錄：使用 OpenSAFELY 對該服務第一年的觀察性研究

articles.title: "I have no idea who does the bone thing" A qualitative exploration of older women and healthcare professionals' experiences to guide improvements in osteoporosis care
articles.authors: Heaven A, Kime N, Shafiq S, Harrison N, Connor J, Johansson JF, Teale E, Sharp C

abstract.text: Background The Older Women's Health Strategy for England highlighted the systemic under-representation of older women in healthcare. Over half of women over 80 are estimated to have osteoporosis, contributing to 180,000 fractures annually in the UK, with substantial personal and economic costs, despite clinically effective treatments and national guidelines being available. Aim To use insights from the experiences of older women and primary healthcare professionals to develop strategies to improve osteoporosis care. Design/Setting A community-based study in England, UK. Method Interviews with 30 community-dwelling older women (aged 70+) diagnosed with osteoporosis, and 31 healthcare professionals including GPs, physiotherapists, pharmacists, practice nurses, a healthcare assistant, and a community matron. We reviewed findings iteratively with our co-production group using a Constructivist Grounded Theory approach. Results Healthcare professionals acknowledged osteoporosis as clinically important but described limited knowledge and understanding. However, older women assumed expertise and proactive engagement from clinicians. Older women normalised symptoms as part of ageing frequently prioritising other co-morbidities. Most were unclear about their diagnosis, prognosis, or treatment plans. Self-management was expected but inadequately supported. There was little routine engagement with the wider primary care team. Digital communication further limited older women's engagement/re-engagement. Conclusion Osteoporosis remains poorly understood and inadequately managed in older women who face barriers, including multimorbidity, digital exclusion, and low self-efficacy. Many older women accept care gaps due to limited awareness and lack of meaningful interaction with healthcare professionals. Improved care navigation and greater involvement of the wider primary care team could enhance engagement and support better self-management.
abstract.textZh: 背景 英國老年婦女健康策略強調了老年婦女在醫療保健領域的系統性代表性不足。據估計，超過一半的 80 歲以上女性患有骨質疏鬆症，儘管有臨床有效的治療方法和國家指南，但英國每年會導致 18 萬例骨折，造成巨大的個人和經濟損失。目標 利用老年婦女和初級保健專業人員的經驗見解來制定改善骨質疏鬆症照護的策略。設計/設置 英國英格蘭的一項基於社區的研究。方法 訪問了 30 名被診斷患有骨質疏鬆症的社區老年婦女（70 歲以上）和 31 名醫療保健專業人員，包括全科醫生、物理治療師、藥劑師、執業護士、一名醫療助理和一名社區護士長。我們使用建構主義紮根理論方法與我們的共同製作小組反覆檢視研究結果。結果 醫療保健專業人士承認骨質疏鬆症具有臨床重要性，但他們的知識和理解有限。然而，老年女性接受了臨床醫生的專業知識和積極參與。作為老化的一部分，老年女性通常會優先考慮其他合併症，使症狀正常化。大多數人不清楚他們的診斷、預後或治療計劃。自我管理是人們所期望的，但卻沒有得到充分支持。與更廣泛的初級保健團隊的例行接觸很少。數位通訊進一步限制了老年女性的參與/重新參與。結論 對於面臨多種障礙（包括多種疾病、數位排斥和自我效能低下）的老年女性來說，骨質疏鬆症仍然知之甚少且管理不充分。由於認識有限以及缺乏與醫療保健專業人員的有意義的互動，許多老年婦女接受護理差距。改善護理導航和更廣泛的初級護理團隊的更多參與可以提高參與度並支持更好的自我管理。

articles.titleZh: 「我不知道誰做了骨頭的事情」對老年婦女和醫療保健專業人員的經驗進行定性探索，以指導骨質疏鬆症護理的改進

articles.title: Enriching New-onset Diabetes for Pancreatic Cancer (ENDPAC): External validation using English sentinel network
articles.authors: Price CA, Claridge H, de Lusignan S, Khalaf N, Mold F, Smith NAS, Winn M, Lemanska A

abstract.text: Pancreatic cancer has very low survival due to late diagnosis. Symptoms are often non-specific, complicating early detection in primary care. The Enriching New-Onset Diabetes for Pancreatic Cancer (ENDPAC) algorithm uses weight change, glycaemic control, and age at diabetes onset to identify new-onset diabetes (NOD) patients at increased pancreatic cancer risk. It was developed in the USA and has not been validated in the UK. Aim To validate ENDPAC in a UK primary care population and assess its predictive utility. Design and setting Retrospective cohort study using ORCHID, a national primary care sentinel network. Method Adults aged ≥50 with NOD and requisite glycated haemoglobin (HbA1c) and weight data were included. ENDPAC scores were calculated. Model performance was evaluated via discrimination, calibration, sensitivity, specificity, PPV and NPV. The Youden index identified optimal cutoffs. Sensitivity analyses assessed measurement timing, repeat HbA1c testing and multiple values. Results Among 70,050 individuals, 185 (0.26%) developed pancreatic cancer. Cases were older with higher HbA1c and greater weight loss at diagnosis. ENDPAC achieved an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.733. An optimal cutoff of ≥3 classified 27.6% of individuals as high-risk, with 62.6% sensitivity, 72.3% specificity, 0.6% PPV and 99.9% NPV. Sensitivity analyses showed similar performance across measurement windows and handling of multiple values. ENDPAC shows moderate discrimination in UK primary care. Although it has a relatively low PPV (0.6%), integration into routine systems could provide scalable, low-cost automated risk stratification, identifying people with NOD at higher pancreatic cancer risk as part of a sequential diagnostic pathway.
abstract.textZh: 由於診斷較晚，胰臟癌的存活率非常低。症狀通常不具有特異性，這使得初級保健的早期發現變得複雜。豐富新發糖尿病治療胰臟癌 (ENDPAC) 演算法利用體重變化、血糖控制和糖尿病發病年齡來識別胰臟癌風險增加的新發糖尿病 (NOD) 患者。它是在美國開發的，尚未在英國得到驗證。目的 在英國初級保健人口中驗證 ENDPAC 並評估其預測效用。使用國家初級保健哨點網路 ORCHID 設計和設置回顧性隊列研究。方法 納入年齡≥50 歲且患有 NOD 和必需糖化血紅蛋白 (HbA1c) 的成年人以及體重數據。計算 ENDPAC 分數。模型性能透過辨別力、校準、敏感性、特異性、PPV 和 NPV 進行評估。約登指數確定了最佳截止點。敏感度分析評估了測量時間、重複 HbA1c 測試和多個值。結果 在 70,050 人中，185 人 (0.26%) 患有胰臟癌。診斷時病例年齡較大，糖化血紅素 (HbA1c) 較高，體重減輕較多。 ENDPAC 的曲線下面積 (AUC) 為 0.733。 ≥3 的最佳臨界值將 27.6% 的個體歸類為高風險，敏感性為 62.6%，特異性為 72.3%，PPV 為 0.6%，NPV 為 99.9%。敏感度分析顯示，跨測量視窗和處理多個值的表現相似。 ENDPAC 在英國初級保健中顯示出中等程度的歧視。儘管它的 PPV 相對較低 (0.6%)，但整合到常規系統中可以提供可擴展的、低成本的自動風險分層，作為序貫診斷途徑的一部分，識別具有較高胰腺癌風險的 NOD 患者。

articles.titleZh: 豐富新發糖尿病治療胰臟癌 (ENDPAC)：使用英國前哨網路進行外部驗證

articles.title: Qualitative insights into identifying and managing polypharmacy: Patient, pharmacist and GP perspectives
articles.authors: Tsang JY, Blakeman T, Sperrin M, Kallis T, Payne RA, Ashcroft D

abstract.text: Background Polypharmacy is a global priority due to potential harms, including adverse drug events, hospitalisations and high treatment burden. Overall, these outcomes have shown little improvement despite numerous interventions indicating that current approaches to identify and manage polypharmacy remain insufficient. Aim To understand how polypharmacy is identified and managed in everyday primary care from patient, pharmacist and GP perspectives. Design and Setting Qualitative semi-structured interviews with 12 patients and 12 professionals (7 clinical pharmacists, 5 GPs) across Greater Manchester. Method Reflexive thematic analysis supported by Normalisation Process Theory and Constant Comparison as sensitisation tools. Results Polypharmacy was widely seen as important work but, in practice, inconsistent case-finding and unclear purposes for polypharmacy medication reviews were reported. Patients viewed medications as essential tools to sustain biopsychosocial elements of life, contrasting with practitioners' clinical priorities to mitigate potential harm. Polypharmacy work routinely contained layers of hidden complexity, which was often overwhelming and placed a heavy emotional burden on patients and professionals. Both patients and professionals required training and experience to effectively manage these complexities. Though a protocol-driven approach was sufficient for simple medication issues, only a longer-term approach, predicated on trust, continuity, relationships and open discussions encouraging healthy conflict, appeared to engage with deeper complexities. Conclusion Polypharmacy work is fraught with complexity and uncertainty, lacking standardised case-finding and clear purpose for both patients and professionals. Better models of care are needed to meet this challenge, encouraging a shift beyond a biomedically dominated protocol-driven approach to a more longitudinal and relational approach.
abstract.textZh: 背景 由於潛在的危害，包括藥物不良事件、住院治療和高治療負擔，多重用藥成為全球優先考慮的問題。總體而言，儘管大量幹預措施表明目前識別和管理多藥物治療的方法仍然不足，但這些結果幾乎沒有改善。目的 從病人、藥劑師和全科醫生的角度了解如何在日常初級保健中識別和管理多重用藥。設計和設置對大曼徹斯特地區 12 名患者和 12 名專業人員（7 名臨床藥劑師，5 名全科醫生）進行定性半結構化訪談。方法 以標準化過程理論和常數比較為敏化工具支援的反思性主題分析。結果 多重用藥被廣泛認為是一項重要工作，但在實踐中，據報告存在病例發現不一致和多重用藥藥物審查目的不明確的情況。患者將藥物視為維持生活生物心理社會要素的重要工具，這與從業者減輕潛在危險的臨床優先事項形成鮮明對比。複方藥物工作通常包含多層隱藏的複雜性，這往往令人難以承受，對患者和專業人員造成沉重的情感負擔。患者和專業人員都需要培訓和經驗來有效管理這些複雜性。雖然協議驅動的方法足以解決簡單的藥物問題，但只有基於信任、連續性、關係和鼓勵健康衝突的公開討論的長期方法似乎才能解決更深層次的複雜性。結論 多重用藥工作充滿複雜性和不確定性，缺乏標準化的病例發現以及患者和專業人員的明確目的。需要更好的護理模式來應對這一挑戰，鼓勵從生物醫學主導的協議驅動方法轉向更縱向和相關的方法。

articles.titleZh: 識別和管理多種藥物的定性見解：病人、藥劑師和全科醫生的觀點

articles.title: Neonatal Survival After Serial Amnioinfusions for Anhydramnios Due to Fetal Kidney Failure: The RAFT Clinical Trial
articles.authors: Miller JL, Baschat AA, Johnson A, Blumenfeld YJ, Schenone MH, Gebb JS, Moldenhauer JS, Zaretsky MV, et al.

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: Anhydramnios from fetal kidney failure causes lethal pulmonary hypoplasia. Serial amnioinfusions have shown promise in mitigating pulmonary disease from bilateral renal agenesis, but efficacy and safety for other causes of fetal kidney failure are unproven.
abstract.textZh: 胎兒腎衰竭引起的羊水不足會導致致命的肺部發育不全。連續羊膜腔輸注已顯示出緩解雙側腎發育不全引起的肺部疾病的希望，但其對胎兒腎衰竭的其他原因的有效性和安全性尚未得到證實。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To assess the efficacy of serial amnioinfusions initiated before 26 weeks' gestation to mitigate lethal pulmonary hypoplasia in cases of anhydramnios due to fetal kidney failure.
abstract.textZh: 旨在評估妊娠 26 週前開始的連續羊膜腔輸注對於減輕因胎兒腎衰竭導致羊水不足的情況下致死性肺發育不全的療效。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Prospective, nonrandomized clinical trial conducted at 13 US fetal therapy centers from December 2018 to February 2025. Outcomes for maternal-fetal pairs with anhydramnios before 22 weeks' gestation due to fetal kidney failure without bilateral renal agenesis are reported; data collection for surviving infants continued until February 13, 2026.
abstract.textZh: 2018 年 12 月至 2025 年 2 月在美國 13 個胎兒治療中心進行的前瞻性、非隨機臨床試驗。報告了妊娠 22 週前因胎兒腎衰竭而無雙側腎發育不全而導致羊水不足的母胎對的結果；倖存嬰兒的數據收集一直持續到 2026 年 2 月 13 日。

abstract.label: EXPOSURE
abstract.text: Thirty-two participants underwent serial amnioinfusions with isotonic fluid beginning before 26 weeks' gestation.
abstract.textZh: 32 位參與者在懷孕 26 週前開始接受連續羊膜腔輸注等滲液。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: The primary end point was neonatal survival for 14 days or longer with dialysis access placement. Secondary outcome measures of survival to discharge home and kidney transplant are reported.
abstract.textZh: 主要終點是放置透析通路後新生兒存活 14 天或更長。報告了出院存活率和腎臟移植的次要結果指標。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Twenty-nine of 32 participants (91%) had a live birth, with a median (IQR) gestational age at delivery of 34 weeks 1 day (31 weeks 5 days to 34 weeks 6 days). All participants delivered before 37 weeks' gestation. No unexpected serious maternal adverse events occurred, and the most common maternal complications were preterm prelabor rupture of membranes in 19 participants (56%) and chorioamniotic separation in 10 (29%). The primary outcome occurred in 19 (65.5%) of 29 live-born neonates (95% CI, 45.7%-82.1%). Factors associated with survival to the primary outcome included receiving more amnioinfusions (median [IQR], 14 [9-18] in survivors vs 7 [4-11] in nonsurvivors; P = .01), longer time interval from first amnioinfusion to preterm prelabor rupture of membranes (63.5 [60.5-74.5] days in survivors vs 29.0 [22.0-56.0] days in nonsurvivors; P = .01), gestational age greater than 32 weeks (79% of survivors vs 38% of nonsurvivors; P = .03), and higher birth weight (2029 [1770-2250] g in survivors vs 1635 [1185-1915] g in nonsurvivors; P = .01). Fourteen live-born infants (48%) survived to hospital discharge at a median (IQR) age of 4.7 (3.4-5.7) months. Of the 11 infants surviving to date, 7 (64%) have undergone kidney transplant between ages 2 years to 5 years.
abstract.textZh: 32 名參與者中有 29 名 (91%) 活產，分娩時的中位數胎齡 (IQR) 為 34 週 1 天（31 週 5 天至 34 週 6 天）。所有參與者均在妊娠 37 週前分娩。沒有發生意外的嚴重產婦不良事件，最常見的產婦併發症是 19 名參與者（56%）的早產胎膜破裂和 10 名參與者（29%）的絨毛膜羊膜分離。主要結局發生在 29 名活產新生兒中的 19 名（65.5%）（95% CI，45.7%-82.1%）。與主要結局的存活率相關的因素包括接受更多的羊膜腔輸注（倖存者中位數[IQR]為14[9-18]，而非倖存者為7[4-11]；P = .01），從第一次羊膜腔輸注到胎膜早破的時間間隔較長（而非倖存者為63.5[60.5-74.9494.94）的倖存者為非倖存者為非.74. [22.0-56.0] 天；P = .01），胎齡大於 32 週（倖存者為 79%，非倖存者為 38%；P = .03），出生體重較高（倖存者為 2029 [1770-2250] g，倖存者為 1633195-1950] g，倖存者 [116335195-19195 g）非倖存者；P = .01)。 14 名活產嬰兒 (48%) 存活至出院，中位數 (IQR) 年齡為 4.7 (3.4-5.7) 個月。迄今為止倖存的 11 名嬰兒中，有 7 名（64%）在 2 歲至 5 歲之間接受過腎臟移植。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: Serial amnioinfusions mitigated lethal pulmonary hypoplasia in neonates with anhydramnios due to fetal kidney failure. Significant neonatal morbidity and mortality independent of early lung function was noted. Factors associated with survival were consistent with the Renal Anhydramnios Fetal Therapy trial's bilateral renal agenesis cohort, suggesting common mechanistic pathways for mitigating pulmonary hypoplasia.
abstract.textZh: 連續羊膜腔輸注可減輕因胎兒腎衰竭而導致羊水不足的新生兒的致死性肺部發育不全。值得注意的是，新生兒發病率和死亡率與早期肺功能無關。與存活相關的因素與腎羊水不足胎兒治療試驗的雙側腎發育不全隊列一致，顯示緩解肺發育不全的共同機制途徑。

abstract.label: TRIAL REGISTRATION
abstract.text: ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT03101891.
abstract.textZh: ClinicalTrials.gov 識別碼：NCT03101891。

articles.titleZh: 連續羊膜腔輸注治療胎兒腎衰竭引起的羊水不足後新生兒的存活率：RAFT 臨床試驗

articles.title: Using large language models to identify prediagnostic clinical features of ovarian cancer from healthcare records: a population-based case-control study
articles.authors: Funston G, Park N, Thompson M, Yetisgen M, Goff BA, Kessler L, Walter FM

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Most women with ovarian cancer are diagnosed after developing symptoms. However, symptoms are often recorded as free text within electronic health records (EHRs), which is not readily accessible for research.
abstract.textZh: 大多數患有卵巢癌的女性是在出現症狀後被診斷出來的。然而，症狀通常以自由文字形式記錄在電子健康記錄 (EHR) 中，不易用於研究。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To use EHRs to examine associations between coded and large language model (LLM)-extracted free-text clinical features with ovarian cancer diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 使用 EHR 檢查編碼和大語言模型 (LLM) 提取的自由文本臨床特徵與卵巢癌診斷之間的關聯。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Population-based case-control study using EHRs and cancer registry data from women attending primary care, outpatient, and emergency clinics associated with the University of Washington, US.
abstract.textZh: 基於人群的病例對照研究，使用美國華盛頓大學相關初級保健、門診和急診診所的女性的電子病歷和癌症登記資料。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: In total, 136 women with ovarian cancer cases (diagnosed 2012-2019) were matched (age, clinic type) to 1360 control participants. Twelve months of prediagnosis coded and free-text data were extracted from EHRs. LLMs were tested on annotated notes, before extracting information on 17 prespecified clinical features. Univariate conditional logistic regression analyses were used to identify clinical features associated with ovarian cancer.
abstract.textZh: 總共有 136 名患有卵巢癌病例（2012-2019 年診斷）的女性與 1360 名對照參與者進行了配對（年齡、診所類型）。從 EHR 中提取了十二個月的診斷前編碼和自由文字資料。在提取 17 個預先指定的臨床特徵的資訊之前，法學碩士在帶註釋的筆記上進行了測試。使用單變量條件邏輯回歸分析來識別與卵巢癌相關的臨床特徵。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: There were 14 clinical features that were more commonly identified from free text using LLMs than from codes in both the case and control groups. There were 14 features that were significantly associated with ovarian cancer when using codes and LLM-extracted data, but only eight features were significant using codes alone. Using both coded and LLM-extracted data, 11 features had odds ratios >2. Thirteen features were significantly associated when restricting analysis to early-stage (I-II) diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 在病例組和對照組中，有 14 種臨床特徵在使用法學碩士的自由文本中比從代碼中更常見。當使用代碼和 LLM 提取的數據時，有 14 個特徵與卵巢癌顯著相關，但僅使用代碼時只有 8 個特徵顯著相關。使用編碼資料和 LLM 擷取的數據，11 個特徵的優勢比 >2。當將分析限制於早期 (I-II) 診斷時，有 13 個特徵顯著相關。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: There is an identifiable ovarian cancer symptom signature within EHRs, with LLM-based natural language processing approaches enabling extraction of key non-coded symptom information. LLMs could support EHR-based research, while LLM-based clinical decision support tools may improve identification of patients with symptoms of possible cancer.
abstract.textZh: EHR 中有可識別的卵巢癌症狀特徵，基於法學碩士的自然語言處理方法可以提取關鍵的非編碼症狀資訊。法學碩士可以支援基於電子病歷的研究，而基於法學碩士的臨床決策支援工具可以改善對可能患有癌症症狀的患者的識別。

articles.titleZh: 使用大語言模型從醫療記錄中識別卵巢癌的診斷前臨床特徵：基於人群的病例對照研究

articles.title: Prediagnostic prescription patterns in pancreatic cancer: a retrospective primary care cohort study
articles.authors: Morel C, Walter FM, Virpal P, Arendse KD, Funston G

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Prescribing patterns in primary care could demonstrate early clinical features of cancer and windows of opportunity for timely investigation.
abstract.textZh: 初級保健的處方模式可以顯示癌症的早期臨床特徵和及時調查的機會之窗。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To analyse primary care prescription patterns before a pancreatic cancer diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 分析胰臟癌診斷前的初級保健處方模式。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Retrospective cohort study using linked primary care and cancer registry data from patients diagnosed with pancreatic cancer in England between 2011 and 2018.
abstract.textZh: 回顧性隊列研究使用 2011 年至 2018 年英國診斷為胰腺癌的患者的初級保健和癌症登記數據。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Prescription records registered in the Clinical Practice Research Datalink were analysed in the 5 years prediagnosis. Eight categories of prescriptions that may be used to treat clinical features of pancreatic cancer were included (anti-emetics, anti-reflux medications, insulin, other hypoglycaemic agents, opioids, non-opioid analgesics, neuropathic analgesics, and non-steroidal anti-inflammatories). Poisson regression was used to estimate the inflection points for increased prescribing above baseline.
abstract.textZh: 在臨床實踐研究資料鏈中註冊的處方記錄在 5 年的診斷前進行了分析。包括八類可用於治療胰臟癌臨床特徵的處方（止吐藥、抗逆流藥物、胰島素、其他降血糖藥、鴉片類藥物、非鴉片類止痛藥、神經性止痛藥和非類固醇抗發炎藥）。泊松回歸用於估計處方增加高於基線的拐點。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 12 990 patients, 669 287 prescriptions were analysed. Insulin was the least common prescription (6.9% [n = 892/12 990] of patients), anti-reflux the most common (52.6% [n = 6833/12 990] of patients). Insulin prescribing increased 19 months prediagnosis (95% confidence interval [CI] = 14.2 to 23.8), rising earlier in female patients (25 months; 95% CI = 17.4 to 32.5) than male patients (11 months; 95% CI = 5.8 to 16.2). Prescriptions for other hypoglycaemic agents increased 13 months (95% CI = 7.7 to 18.5), anti-reflux and opioid analgesic prescribing 7 months (95% CI = 5.4 to 8.6 and 4.4 to 9.6, respectively), and anti-emetics and non-opioid analgesics 5 months (95% CI = 2.9 to 7.1 and 3.2 to 6.8, respectively) before diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 在 12 990 名患者中，分析了 669 287 份處方。胰島素是最不常見的處方（6.9% [n = 892/12 990] 的病人），抗逆流藥物是最常見的（52.6% [n = 6833/12 990] 的病人）。診斷前胰島素處方增加 19 個月（95% 信賴區間 [CI] = 14.2 至 23.8），女性患者（25 個月；95% CI = 17.4 至 32.5）的增加早於男性患者（11 個月；95% CI = 5.8 至 16.2）。其他降血糖藥處方增加 13 個月（95% CI = 7.7 至 18.5），抗反流和阿片類鎮痛藥處方增加 7 個月（95% CI = 5.4 至 8.6 和 4.4 至 9.6），止吐藥和非阿片類鎮痛藥處方增加 5 個月（9% CI = 295% CI.至7.1和3.2至6.8，分別）診斷前。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: The early increase in insulin prescribing suggests tumour-induced type 3c diabetes, highlighting an opportunity for earlier diagnosis in a small proportion of patients. Opportunities for earlier diagnosis through investigation and referral also exist in patients prescribed anti-emetic, anti-reflux, and analgesic medications in primary care.
abstract.textZh: 胰島素處方的早期增加表明腫瘤誘發的 3c 型糖尿病，強調了對一小部分患者進行早期診斷的機會。在初級保健中服用止吐、抗逆流和鎮痛藥物的患者也有機會透過調查和轉診進行早期診斷。

articles.titleZh: 胰臟癌的診斷前處方模式：一項回顧性初級保健隊列研究

articles.title: Effectiveness of hypnotherapy for paediatric abdominal pain in primary care: a randomised controlled trial
articles.authors: Ganzevoort IN, Berger MY, de Boer MR, Benninga MA, Vlieger AM, Holtman GA

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Functional abdominal pain (FAP) and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) are associated with anxiety, depression, school absenteeism, and reduced quality of life in children. In secondary care, hypnotherapy is often available.
abstract.textZh: 功能性腹痛 (FAP) 和腸躁症 (IBS) 與兒童焦慮、憂鬱、缺課和生活品質下降有關。在二級護理中，通常可以使用催眠療法。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To determine the effectiveness of home-based guided hypnotherapy for children with FAP or IBS in primary care.
abstract.textZh: 確定家庭引導催眠治療對初級保健中患有 FAP 或 IBS 的兒童的有效性。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: This was a pragmatic randomised controlled trial in Dutch primary care with a follow-up of 12 months.
abstract.textZh: 這是荷蘭初級保健領域的實用隨機對照試驗，追蹤期為 12 個月。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Children aged 7-17 years with FAP or IBS diagnosed by a GP were included. The intervention group received home-based guided hypnotherapy via a website for 3 months in addition to care as usual. The control group received care as usual only. The primary outcome was adequate relief of abdominal pain and/or discomfort at 12 months. Adjusted odds ratios (aORs) and 90% confidence intervals (90% CIs) are reported.
abstract.textZh: 經全科醫生診斷患有 FAP 或 IBS 的 7-17 歲兒童也被納入其中。介入組除照常照護外，也透過網站接受為期3個月的居家導引催眠治療。對照組僅接受照常護理。主要結局是 12 個月時腹痛和/或不適得到充分緩解。報告調整後的比值比 (aOR) 和 90% 信賴區間 (90% CI)。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: In total, 152 children were included. No significant differences were observed in adequate relief at 12 months, 79.5% in the intervention group (58/73 children) versus 74.3% in the control group (52/70 children); aOR 1.47 (90% CI = 0.74 to 2.93), but more children in the intervention group had adequate relief compared with the control group at 3 months (aOR 2.74, 90% CI = 1.22 to 6.13) and 6 months (aOR 4.26, 90% CI = 1.81 to 10.04). The intervention group also showed reductions in abdominal pain severity, intensity, frequency, and threat, and higher proportions of fast sleep onset.
abstract.textZh: 總共有 152 名兒童。 12 個月時，在充分緩解方面沒有觀察到顯著差異，幹預組（58/73 名兒童）為 79.5%，而對照組（52/70 名兒童）為 74.3%； aOR 1.47（90% CI = 0.74 至 2.93），但對照組與兒童幹預， 199990% CI = 209993），但對照組與兒童幹預， 1999993（2092% CI至 6.13）和 6 個月（aOR 4.26，90% CI = 1.81 至 10.04）時獲得充分緩解。幹預組也表現出腹痛嚴重程度、強度、頻率和威脅的降低，以及快速入睡的比例更高。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Although adequate relief after 12 months is high in both groups, adding hypnotherapy to care as usual may help achieve earlier relief and reduce pain.
abstract.textZh: 儘管兩組患者在 12 個月後得到充分緩解的情況都很高，但照常在護理中加入催眠療法可能有助於更早緩解疼痛並減輕疼痛。

articles.titleZh: 初級保健中催眠療法對小兒腹痛的有效性：一項隨機對照試驗

articles.title: Conceptualising diagnostic liminality: a qualitative exploration of the journey to heart failure diagnosis
articles.authors: Goyder CR, Taylor CJ, Newhouse N, Pope C, Hobbs FR, Hinton L

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Heart failure (HF) is a global public health priority. HF diagnosis in primary care is linked to improved outcomes, but most patients are diagnosed in hospital. The pathway to HF diagnosis in primary care is poorly understood.
abstract.textZh: 心臟衰竭（HF）是全球公共衛生的優先事項。初級保健中的心臟衰竭診斷與改善預後有關，但大多數患者是在醫院診斷的。人們對初級保健中心力衰竭診斷的途徑知之甚少。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To gain deeper understanding of the patient experience of missed opportunities for HF diagnosis and develop recommendations for clinical practice.
abstract.textZh: 更深入了解患者錯失心臟衰竭診斷機會的經歷，並為臨床實踐提出建議。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: A qualitative study with patients recruited through general practice and community nurse clinics in England.
abstract.textZh: 透過英格蘭全科診所和社區護理診所招募的患者進行的一項定性研究。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: We conducted remote, semi-structured interviews with 24 patients who had a diagnosis of HF. Data were analysed using reflexive thematic analysis.
abstract.textZh: 我們對 24 名診斷為心臟衰竭的患者進行了遠端半結構化訪談。使用反思性主題分析對資料進行分析。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Three themes were developed: diagnostic liminality and suffering at the threshold of HF diagnosis (when participants were unwell but not yet diagnosed or were unaware of their diagnosis); meaning and framing in the diagnostic moment; and truth-telling and sense-making facilitating the escape from liminality. Although receiving the diagnosis brought relief, it also came as a shock owing to the meanings associated with the term. Some thought HF meant imminent death and was incompatible with living. Participants also described not being properly informed about their diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 制定了三個主題：診斷界限和心臟衰竭診斷閾值時的痛苦（當參與者身體不適但尚未診斷或不知道自己的診斷時）；診斷時刻的意義和框架；講真話和講道理有助於擺脫閾限。雖然收到診斷結果讓人鬆了口氣，但由於與該術語相關的含義，也令人震驚。有些人認為心臟衰竭意味著死亡臨近，與生存格格不入。參與者也表示沒有正確告知他們的診斷結果。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Although life was disrupted by an HF diagnosis, the diagnosis did not enable the transition from liminality. It was truth-telling, in combination with careful explanation, that facilitated the shift from diagnostic liminality. Through sense-making, participants were able to build an understanding of what an HF diagnosis actually meant for them and their future. Clinicians have a vitally important role in guiding patients away from diagnostic liminality through prompt HF diagnosis and thoughtful communication.
abstract.textZh: 儘管心臟衰竭的診斷擾亂了生活，但該診斷並沒有使人們擺脫閾限狀態。講真話與仔細的解釋相結合，促進了診斷閾限的轉變。透過意義建構，參與者能夠了解心臟衰竭診斷對他們及其未來的實際意義。透過及時的心臟衰竭診斷和深思熟慮的溝通，臨床醫生在引導患者擺脫診斷界限方面發揮著至關重要的作用。

articles.titleZh: 概念化診斷閾限：心臟衰竭診斷之旅的定性探索

articles.title: Characteristics of Children Seeking Care at School-Based Health Centers
articles.authors: Trivedi M, Kaufmann J, Pereira H, McGrath BM, Marino M, Spano M, Lucas JA, Broder-Fingert S, et al.

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: There has yet to be a comprehensive multi-state study describing the children that use school-based health centers (SBHCs). This study seeks to determine sociodemographics, care utilization patterns, and prevalence of asthma and overweight among children seeking care at SBHCs.
abstract.textZh: 目前還沒有一項全面的多州研究來描述使用學校健康中心 (SBHC) 的兒童。本研究旨在確定在 SBHC 尋求護理的兒童中的社會人口統計特徵、護理利用模式以及氣喘和超重的盛行率。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This retrospective cross-sectional analysis examined electronic health record data of children utilizing SBHCs within a large network of community-based clinics, consisting of 180 SBHCs in 14 U.S. states from 2012-2018. Demographics of exclusive SBHC users (SBHC-only group) were compared to utilizers of SBHCs plus non-SBHC community health centers (SBHC+ group).
abstract.textZh: 這項回顧性橫斷面分析檢視了大型社區診所網路中使用 SBHC 的兒童的電子健康記錄數據，該網路由 2012 年至 2018 年美國 14 個州的 180 個 SBHC 組成。將獨家 SBHC 使用者（僅限 SBHC 組）的人口統計資料與 SBHC 加非 SBHC 社區健康中心的使用者（SBHC+ 組）進行比較。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Of 179,970 children with ≥1 ambulatory visit at a SBHC, 75.6% received care exclusively at SBHCs. Many SBHC-users reported family income <138% of the federal poverty line (48.9%) and self-identified as Hispanic (45.7%). Among SBHC utilizers, the prevalence of asthma (8%) and overweight (30%) were comparable to national statistics. Overall, 33% of children received well-childcare and 24% received influenza vaccinations exclusively at SBHCs. When comparing the two groups within the study, the SBHC-only group were older, and more lacked insurance (13.4%) compared with SBHC+ children (2.6%). The SBHC-only group had fewer total yearly visits, fewer yearly well-child visits, and fewer influenza vaccinations. In age stratified groups, preschool-aged children received the most well-childcare and influenza vaccinations in SBHCs.
abstract.textZh: 在 SBHC 門診就診次數≥1 次的 179,970 名兒童中，75.6% 只在 SBHC 接受護理。許多 SBHC 使用者報告家庭收入<聯邦貧窮線的 138% (48.9%)，並自我認定為西班牙裔 (45.7%)。在 SBHC 使用者中，氣喘 (8%) 和超重 (30%) 的盛行率與國家統計數據相當。總體而言，33% 的兒童接受了良好的托兒服務，24% 的兒童僅在 SBHC 接受了流感疫苗接種。在比較研究中的兩組時，與 SBHC+ 兒童 (2.6%) 相比，僅 SBHC 組年齡較大，且較多缺乏保險 (13.4%)。僅 SBHC 組的每年總就診次數、每年健康兒童就診次數和流感疫苗接種次數均較少。在按年齡分層的群體中，學齡前兒童在 SBHC 中獲得了最好的托兒服務和流感疫苗接種。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: SBHCs serve a pediatric population that is disproportionately low-income, uninsured, and Hispanic. Children, particularly preschoolers, receive preventive healthcare at SBHCs. Given the population served, SBHCs have strong potential to address pediatric health inequities if adequately resourced, utilized, and integrated with other facilities including community health centers.
abstract.textZh: SBHC 為低收入、無保險和西班牙裔的兒科族群提供服務。兒童，特別是學齡前兒童，在 SBHC 接受預防性醫療保健。鑑於所服務的人口，如果有足夠的資源、利用並與包括社區健康中心在內的其他設施整合，SBHC 具有解決兒科健康不平等問題的巨大潛力。

articles.titleZh: 在校內健康中心尋求照護的兒童的特點

articles.title: An Analysis of Common Questions and Concerns of Older Adults with Multiple Chronic Conditions
articles.authors: Lal K, Schneider C, Espinoza AM, Hendrix ZN, Young RA, White A, Lopez CM, Xiao Y, et al.

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: Studies have shown that facilitating patient dialogue through a structured question prompt list (QPL) during patient encounters results in greater patient engagement, improved communication and increased patient understanding. Topics most interesting to patients are unclear, thus limiting how to optimally design and use QPLs. This study identified topics most interesting to patients to discuss with their clinicians in primary care office visits.
abstract.textZh: 研究表明，在與患者會面時透過結構化問題提示清單 (QPL) 促進患者對話可以提高患者參與度、改善溝通並增進患者理解。患者最感興趣的主題尚不清楚，因此限制瞭如何優化設計和使用 QPL。這項研究確定了患者在初級保健辦公室就診時與臨床醫生討論最感興趣的話題。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We collected responses to a 20-item visit guide including questions to ask, concerns to tell, and positive behaviors to report. We focused on the ask and tell sections which involved general questions and concerns patients could choose from. Participants were 50 years or older and taking 5 or more medications at family medicine clinics from a public safety net hospital system (240) and an urban private practice (211).
abstract.textZh: 我們收集了對包含 20 項訪問指南的回复，包括要提出的問題、要講述的疑慮以及要報告的積極行為。我們專注於詢問和講述部分，其中涉及患者可以選擇的一般問題和疑慮。參與者年齡在 50 歲或以上，在公共安全網路醫院系統 (240) 和城市私人診所 (211) 的家庭醫學診所服用 5 種或以上藥物。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Of 451 visit guides collected, the selected top topics involved: 1) Diet (20.4%), 2) Taking fewer medications (15.3%), and 3) Understanding their condition (14.6%). The most common medication concerns included: 1) stopping or skipping medications due to cost, side effects, or other reasons (11.1%), 2) medications from multiple doctors (8%), and 3) specific concerns about medications (5.7%).
abstract.textZh: 在收集的 451 份就診指南中，選定的熱門主題涉及：1）飲食（20.4％），2）減少服藥（15.3％），以及 3）了解自己的病情（14.6％）。最常見的用藥擔憂包括：1）由於費用、副作用或其他原因而停止或跳過用藥（11.1％），2）來自多個醫生的藥物（8％），以及3）對藥物的具體擔憂（5.7％）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Patients reported interest in discussing questions and concerns related to diet, reducing medications, and self-care knowledge on their conditions. The questions and concerns identified in this study provide insight into the communication priorities of older adults managing multiple medications. These findings can further inform the future development of QPLs and therefore potentially reap the benefits of improved clinician-patient communication.
abstract.textZh: 患者表示有興趣討論與飲食、減少用藥以及有關其病情的自我護理知識相關的問題和擔憂。本研究中確定的問題和擔憂提供了對管理多種藥物的老年人的溝通優先事項的深入了解。這些發現可以進一步為 QPL 的未來發展提供訊息，從而有可能從改善臨床醫病溝通中獲益。

articles.titleZh: 患有多種慢性病的老年人的常見問題和擔憂分析

articles.title: Primary HPV Testing for Cervical Cancer Screening Among Family Medicine Educators
articles.authors: Young AP, Reyes R, Mgbudem C, Chen D, Sen A, Harper DM

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Half of the women who develop cervical cancer in the US have never had a cervical cancer screen. Self-sampling is an equivalent technique to the invasive speculum exam. We aim to evaluate the current knowledge, attitudes, and behaviors toward self-sampled primary HPV testing in family medicine.
abstract.textZh: 在美國，一半患有子宮頸癌的女性從未接受過子宮頸癌篩檢。自採樣是與侵入性窺器檢查等效的技術。我們的目的是評估家庭醫學中目前對自我採樣初級 HPV 檢測的知識、態度和行為。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: The annual cross-sectional survey of the Council of Academic Family Medicine's general membership included knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about primary human papillomavirus (HPV) screening using self-sampling. The knowledge questions were based on current guidelines, as defined by the 2024 United States Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF) 1. The attitude and belief questions were based on the Question-Behavior Theory 2. All surveys were emailed to the membership with up to five weekly reminders to complete.
abstract.textZh: 家庭醫學學術委員會的年度橫斷面調查包括對使用自我取樣進行初級人類乳突病毒 (HPV) 篩檢的知識、態度和信念。知識問題是基於 2024 年美國預防服務工作小組 (USPSTF) 1 定義的現行指引。態度和信念問題是基於問題行為理論 2。所有調查均透過電子郵件發送給會員，並每週最多提醒五次完成。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: We had a 62% survey response rate with 744 respondents. Regardless of demographic descriptors, all respondents significantly changed their intended behavior regarding offering self-sampling for cervical cancer screening (p < 0.001). Of those with a baseline attitude of not offering self-sampling, 88% changed their response to offer self-sampling at the end of the survey. Baseline knowledge of the advantages of primary HPV screening was lowest among underrepresented minority Hispanic respondents (52% correct, compared to 80% among Whites, p < 0.001). Women respondents were 2.96 times more likely to intend to offer self-sampling for cervical cancer screening than men (OR 2.96 (95% CI: 1.18, 7.44, p<0.05).
abstract.textZh: 我們對 744 位受訪者的調查回覆率為 62%。無論人口統計特徵如何，所有受訪者都顯著改變了他們在為子宮頸癌篩檢提供自我採樣方面的預期行為（p < 0.001）。在原本持不提供自我抽樣態度的人中，88% 的人在調查結束時改變了態度，轉而提供自我抽樣。代表性不足的少數族裔西班牙裔受訪者對初級 HPV 篩檢優勢的基線了解最低（正確率為 52%，而白人為 80%，p < 0.001）。女性受訪者願意自我採樣進行子宮頸癌篩檢的可能性是男性的 2.96 倍（OR 2.96 (95% CI: 1.18, 7.44, p<0.05)。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Based on the Question-Behavior Theory, over 90% of family medicine educators intend to offer women self-sampling for cervical cancer screening.
abstract.textZh: 根據問題行為理論，超過 90% 的家庭醫學教育者打算為女性提供自我採樣以進行子宮頸癌篩檢。

articles.titleZh: 家庭醫學教育工作者中用於子宮頸癌篩檢的初級 HPV 檢測

articles.title: "Hard Fork" for Family Medicine - Artificial Intelligence Will Change the Way We Experience Practice
articles.authors: Kallenberg GA, Bennett IM

abstract.text: The increasing advance of artificial intelligence (AI) in medicine will affect the future of Family Medicine in many ways. Some of the effects may be salutary, but others may infringe on the real work of family medicine/primary care. AI will change the way we experience practice. If AI can perform many current physician tasks, what will be left for the practicing human family physician? We believe that there will be several types of patient encounters that will still require the human touch that comes from established long-term continuous healing relationships between family physicians and their patients. As AI applications in primary care become more robust it will assume the function of a new member of the multi-professional healthcare team, and physicians will learn to operate in a new triad: the "doctor-patient-AI partner relationship". We explore possible further effects on the practice of family medicine under these new AI-enhanced circumstances and contemplate their impact on the current gap in primary care availability, continuity of care and the attractiveness of primary care careers. As we pass through this potential "hard fork" for family medicine we are convinced that family medicine is the most likely component of the healthcare system to survive and prosper with AI.
abstract.textZh: 人工智慧（AI）在醫學領域的日益進步將從多方面影響家庭醫學的未來。其中一些影響可能是有益的，但其他影響可能會損害家庭醫學/初級保健的實際工作。人工智慧將改變我們體驗練習的方式。如果人工智慧可以執行許多當前的醫生任務，那麼對於執業的人類家庭醫生來說還剩下什麼？我們相信，有幾種類型的患者接觸仍然需要家庭醫生與其患者之間建立的長期持續治療關係所帶來的人情味。隨著人工智慧在初級保健中的應用變得更加強大，它將承擔起多專業醫療團隊新成員的功能，醫生將學習如何在新的三元組中運作：「醫生-患者-人工智慧合作夥伴關係」。我們探討了在人工智慧增強的新環境下對家庭醫學實踐可能產生的進一步影響，並思考它們對當前初級保健可用性、護理連續性和初級保健職業吸引力方面差距的影響。當我們經歷家庭醫學的潛在「硬分叉」時，我們相信家庭醫學是醫療保健系統中最有可能在人工智慧的幫助下生存和繁榮的組成部分。

articles.titleZh: 家庭醫學「硬分叉」—人工智慧將改變我們體驗實踐的方式

articles.title: Adverse Events After Same-Day COVID-19 and Influenza Vaccination Versus Influenza Vaccination Alone : A Target Trial Emulation
articles.authors: Xie Y, Choi T, Al-Aly Z

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Safety studies of the COVID-19 vaccine have identified some adverse events. Yet newer variant-updated formulations, along with increased hybrid immunity, may change these risks. Early-era safety data may not reflect experience with updated formulations in more immune-experienced populations.
abstract.textZh: COVID-19 疫苗的安全性研究發現了一些不良事件。然而，新的變異更新配方以及增強的混合免疫力可能會改變這些風險。早期的安全性數據可能無法反映在免疫經驗較多的人群中使用更新配方的經驗。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To evaluate 90-day risks for adverse events after coadministration of COVID-19 and influenza vaccines compared with influenza vaccination alone, across bivalent, XBB-adapted, and KP-adapted COVID-19 vaccine periods.
abstract.textZh: 評估在雙價、XBB 適應和 KP 適應的 COVID-19 疫苗接種期間，與單獨接種流感疫苗相比，同時接種 COVID-19 和流感疫苗後 90 天不良事件的風險。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Target trial emulation using electronic health care data.
abstract.textZh: 使用電子醫療保健數據進行目標試驗模擬。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs.
abstract.textZh: 美國退伍軍人事務部。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Participants receiving both COVID-19 and seasonal influenza vaccines (n = 705 124) and those receiving only an influenza vaccine (n = 1 813 205) between 1 September 2022 and 26 August 2025.
abstract.textZh: 在2022年9月1日至2025年8月26日期間同時接種COVID-19和季節性流感疫苗的參與者（ n = 705 124 ）和僅接種流感疫苗的參與者（ n = 1 813 205 ）。

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Receipt of both COVID-19 and seasonal influenza vaccines versus receipt of only an influenza vaccine.
abstract.textZh: 新冠肺炎疫苗和季節性流感疫苗的接種與僅接種流感疫苗的接種。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: 90-day risks for 46 prespecified individual adverse events grouped into 3 composite outcomes (tier 1, serious or life-threatening; tier 2, clinically significant; tier 3, less severe or self-limiting), using weighted discrete-time survival models.
abstract.textZh: 使用加權離散時間生存模型，將46個預先指定的個體不良事件的90天風險分組為3個複合結果（第1級，嚴重或威脅生命；第2級，臨牀顯著性；第3級，不太嚴重或自我限制）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: For all 3 composite outcomes, risks were similar between groups: tier 1 (risk ratio [RR], 1.03 [95% CI, 0.99 to 1.09]), tier 2 (RR, 0.99 [CI, 0.96 to 1.03]), and tier 3 (RR, 0.99 [CI, 0.96 to 1.02]). Of the 46 individual adverse events, 2 tier-3 risks had nominal statistical significance: syncope (RR, 1.09 [CI, 1.02 to 1.17]) and tinnitus (RR, 0.95 [CI, 0.92 to 0.99]); no risks were statistically significant after correcting for multiple comparisons. For all risks in tier 1 or tier 2, confidence bounds included 1.0 (no effect). In period-stratified analyses, neither composite (tier) nor individual event estimates supported differences in risks between groups.
abstract.textZh: 對於所有3個綜合結果，組別之間的風險相似： 1級（風險比率[RR] ， 1.03 [95% CI ， 0.99至1.09] ）、2級（ RR ， 0.99 [CI ， 0.96至1.03] ）和3級（ RR ， 0.99 [CI ， 0.96至1.02] ）。在46例個體不良事件中， 2例3級風險具有名義統計學顯著性：暈厥（ RR ， 1.09 [CI ， 1.02至1.17] ）和耳鳴（ RR ， 0.95 [CI ， 0.92至0.99] ） ；在校正多次比較後，風險無統計學顯著性。對於第1級或第2級的所有風險，置信界限包括1.0 （無影響）。在期間分層分析中，無論是綜合（層級）還是單個事件估計都不支持羣組之間的風險差異。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Generalizability and potential unmeasured confounding.
abstract.textZh: 普遍性和潛在的未測量混淆。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Same-day coadministration of COVID-19 and influenza vaccines was not associated with an increased risk for adverse events in 3 updated-formulation periods. These findings support the short-term safety of coadministration.
abstract.textZh: 在3個更新的配方期內， COVID-19疫苗和流感疫苗的當日合用與不良事件風險增加無關。這些發現支持短期合併用藥的安全性。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs.
abstract.textZh: 美國退伍軍人事務部。

articles.titleZh: 同日接種 COVID-19 和流感疫苗與單獨接種流感疫苗後的不良事件：目標試驗模擬

articles.title: Leveraging Real-World Evidence to Inform Regulatory, Clinical, and Coverage Decisions Related to Glucagon-Like Peptide-1-Based Therapies: Synopsis of a National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases Workshop
articles.authors: Arterburn D, Curtis LH, Toh S, Bradley MC, D'Alessio D, Duchovny N, Hines D, Narain K, et al.

abstract.text: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1RAs) have transformed obesity and diabetes management, with rapidly expanding indications and use among U.S. adults. Despite their promise, key questions remain about optimal treatment pathways, long-term safety, effectiveness across diverse populations, adherence, and economic impact. Real-world evidence (RWE) derived from electronic health records, claims, and other data sources could address these gaps, but unique challenges complicate its use, such as inconsistent insurance coverage, high discontinuation rates, medication shortages, compounded formulations, and off-label prescribing. To explore these issues, the National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases convened a workshop in May 2025 with experts from regulatory agencies, guideline committees, payers, and academia. Discussions focused on identifying knowledge gaps in GLP-1RA use, evaluating how RWE informs practice, assessing limitations of real-world data, and strategies to reduce bias in RWE. Presentations emphasized RWE's potential to complement randomized trials by capturing rare adverse events, long-term outcomes, and effectiveness in routine care. However, persistent challenges include data reliability, confounding, and incomplete capture of medication use and outcomes, particularly in pediatric and underserved populations. Coverage decisions remain heterogeneous across Medicare, Medicaid, and private payers and across time, underscoring the need for rigorous cost-benefit analyses. The workshop concluded that robust RWE is essential for developing value-based coverage policies and optimizing GLP-1RA use. Continued investment in high-quality data infrastructure and analytic methods will be critical to inform regulatory, clinical, and economic decisions as utilization expands.
abstract.textZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑（ GLP-1RAs ）已經改變了肥胖和糖尿病管理，在美國成年人中的適應症和使用迅速擴大。 儘管他們的承諾，關鍵問題仍然是關於最佳治療途徑、長期安全性、對不同人羣的有效性、依從性和經濟影響。 來自電子健康記錄、索賠和其他數據來源的真實世界證據（ RWE ）可以解決這些差距，但獨特的挑戰使其使用複雜化，例如保險範圍不一致、停藥率高、藥物短缺、複方製劑和標籤外處方。 為了探討這些問題，國家糖尿病、消化和腎臟疾病研究所於2025年5月召開了一次研討會，來自監管機構、指南委員會、付款人和學術界的專家參加了研討會。 討論的重點是找出GLP-1RA使用方面的知識差距，評估RWE如何為實踐提供信息，評估現實世界數據的局限性，以及減少RWE偏見的策略。 演示文稿強調了RWE通過捕捉罕見的不良事件、長期結果和常規護理的有效性來補充隨機試驗的潛力。 然而，持續存在的挑戰包括藥物使用和結果的數據可靠性、混淆和不完整的捕獲，特別是在兒科和服務不足的人羣中。 醫療保險、醫療補助和私人支付者之間以及隨著時間的推移，承保決策仍然各不相同，這突顯了

articles.titleZh: 利用真實世界的證據來告知與胰高血糖素樣肽-1基療法相關的監管、臨牀和覆蓋決策：國家糖尿病和消化及腎臟疾病研究所研討會概要

articles.title: Methodological Approaches to Real-World Evidence Generation for Glucagon-like Peptide-1-Based Therapies: Synopsis of a National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases Workshop
articles.authors: Curtis LH, Arterburn D, Toh S, Guo J, Hernán MA, Iturralde E, Jastreboff A, Lewis KH, et al.

abstract.text: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1RAs) have reshaped the clinical approach to managing obesity and type 2 diabetes. As approved indications have expanded, use of GLP-1RAs has increased rapidly in the United States. Although randomized trials demonstrate strong efficacy, many questions remain about their optimal use in clinical practice. Real-world data (RWD) from electronic health records, registries, insurance claims, and other sources offer a promising avenue to address these questions. However, concerns about data quality, selection bias, and incomplete ascertainment of medication use and outcomes pose significant challenges to the validity of the resulting evidence. In May 2025, the National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases convened experts from regulatory agencies, payer organizations, and academia to explore these challenges. This second of 2 synopsis articles on the workshop summarizes the discussion around the strengths and limitations of various RWD sources and methodological approaches to strengthen causal inference and generalizability. Presenters highlighted pragmatic clinical trials and target trial emulation as strategies to generate stronger real-world evidence (RWE) that is relevant to both clinical practice and policy. The workshop underscored that careful attention to study design, data limitations, and analytic approach is essential to yield RWE that informs clinicians, patients, payers, and policymakers.
abstract.textZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑（ GLP-1RAs ）重塑了管理肥胖和2型糖尿病的臨牀方法。 隨著批準適應症的擴大， GLP-1RA在美國的使用迅速增加。 雖然隨機試驗顯示出強大的療效，但仍有許多關於其在臨牀實踐中的最佳使用的問題。 來自電子健康記錄、登記處、保險索償和其他來源的真實世界數據（ RWD ）為解決這些問題提供了一個有希望的途徑。 然而，對數據質量、選擇偏差以及藥物使用和結果的不完全確定性的擔憂對結果證據的有效性構成了重大挑戰。 2025年5月，國家糖尿病、消化和腎臟疾病研究所召集來自監管機構、付款人組織和學術界的專家，探討這些挑戰。 這兩篇關於研討會的摘要文章中的第二篇總結了各種RWD來源的優勢和局限性以及加強因果推斷和概括性的方法論方法的討論。 演講者強調務實的臨牀試驗和目標試驗模擬是產生與臨牀實踐和政策相關的更強實際證據（ RWE ）的策略。 研討會強調，認真關注研究設計、數據限制和分析方法對於產生RWE至關重要， RWE將告知臨牀醫生、患者、付款人和政策制定者。

articles.titleZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1基療法真實世界證據生成的方法論方法：國家糖尿病、消化和腎臟疾病研究所研討會概要

articles.title: Weekly and Biweekly Treatment With Bofanglutide Versus Semaglutide in Chinese Patients With Type 2 Diabetes : A Phase 2b Randomized Clinical Trial
articles.authors: Liu M, Cheng Z, Lu L, Cai H, Liu J, Liu J, Zheng Y, Wang S, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Bofanglutide is a novel glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonist under development for type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) and overweight and obesity.
abstract.textZh: Bofanglutide是一種正在開發的新型胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑，用於2型糖尿病（ T2DM ）以及超重和肥胖。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To evaluate the efficacy and safety of bofanglutide compared with semaglutide.
abstract.textZh: 評估bofanglutide與semaglutide的療效和安全性。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Phase 2b, randomized, open-label, active-controlled trial. (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT06256549).
abstract.textZh: 2b期、隨機、開放標籤、活性對照試驗。（ ClinicalTrials.gov ： NCT06256549 ）。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Multicenter (37 sites in China).
abstract.textZh: 多中心（中國37個據點）。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Adults with T2DM who were drug-naive or receiving stable oral antidiabetic drugs (glycated hemoglobin A1c [HbA1c], 7.0% to 11.0%).
abstract.textZh: 初治或接受穩定口服抗糖尿病藥物（糖化血紅蛋白A1c [HbA1c] ， 7.0%至11.0% ）的T2DM成人。

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Participants were randomly assigned 1:1:1:1:1 to 1 of 5 treatment groups: bofanglutide titrated to targets of 12, 18, or 24 mg (biweekly [once every 2 weeks; Q2W]); bofanglutide titrated to 24 mg (once weekly [QW]); or semaglutide titrated to 1 mg QW.
abstract.textZh: 參與者被隨機分配1: 1: 1: 1: 1至5個治療組中的1個：以12、18或24mg的目標劑量滴定bofanglutide （雙週一次[每2週一次； Q2W] ） ；以24mg劑量滴定bofanglutide （每週一次[QW] ） ；或以1mg QW劑量劑量劑量劑量濃度濃度的semaglutide。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Change in HbA1c level from baseline to week 24 (primary end point), secondary efficacy end points, and safety.
abstract.textZh: 從基線到第24週的HbA1c水準變化（主要終點）、次要療效終點和安全性。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Overall, 272 participants were enrolled, with a mean age of 50.8 years, HbA1c level of 8.35%, and body mass index of 27.9 kg/m2. At week 24, HbA1c level change from baseline was -1.87% (95% CI, -2.11% to -1.63%), -2.28% (CI, -2.54% to -2.03%), and -1.94% (CI, -2.19% to -1.69%) for bofanglutide 12, 18, 24 mg Q2W, respectively; -2.32% (CI, -2.57% to -2.06%) for bofanglutide 24 mg QW; and -1.60% (CI, -1.85% to -1.35%) for 1 mg of semaglutide QW. Corresponding treatment differences versus semaglutide were -0.27% (CI, -0.61% to -0.08%), -0.68% (CI, -1.04% to -0.33%), -0.34% (CI, -0.70% to 0.02%), and -0.72% (CI, -1.08% to -0.36%), respectively. Gastrointestinal adverse events (GIAEs) (mostly grade 1 or 2 in severity) occurred in 81.8% to 87.3% and 51.9% of participants in the bofanglutide and semaglutide groups, respectively. Hypoglycemia occurred in 0% to 3.8% versus 1.9%, with no severe hypoglycemia.
abstract.textZh: 總體而言，招募了272名參與者，平均年齡為50.8歲， HbA1c水平為8.35% ，體重指數為27.9 kg/m2。在第24週， bofanglutide 12、18、24 mg Q2W與基線相比的HbA1c水準變化分別為-1.87% (95% CI ， -2.11%至-1.63%)、-2.28% (CI ， -2.54%至-2.03%)和-1.94% (CI ， -2.19%至-1.69%) ； bofanglutide 24 mg QW為-2.32% (CI ， -2.57%至-2.06%) ； 1 mg semaglutide QW為-1.60% (CI ， -1.85%至-1.35%)。相應的治療與semaglutide的差異分別為-0.27% (CI ， -0.61%至-0.08%)、-0.68% (CI ， -1.04%至-0.33%)、-0.34% (CI ， -0.70%至0.02%)和-0.72% (CI ， -1.08%至-0.36%)。bofanglutide和semaglutide組分別有81.8%至87.3%和51.9%的參與者發生胃腸道不良事件(GIAE) (主要為1級或2級嚴重程度)。低血糖發生率為0 ％至3.8 ％ ，而非1.9 ％ ，沒有嚴重的低血糖。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Open-label, short duration, only Chinese participants.
abstract.textZh: 標籤開放，持續時間短，僅限中國參與者。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Meaningful reductions in HbA1c levels were seen with bofanglutide in patients with T2DM; GIAEs were the most common and generally manageable.
abstract.textZh: 在T2DM患者中，使用bofanglutide可顯著降低HbA1c水平； GIAE是最常見且通常可控制的。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals.
abstract.textZh: Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals。

articles.titleZh: 中國2型糖尿病患者使用Bofanglutide對比Semaglutide的每週和每兩週一次治療： 2b期隨機臨牀試驗

articles.title: Reporting Interest-Holder Engagement in Practice Guidelines: The RIGHT-MuSE Checklist
articles.authors: Yu X, Zeidan L, Khabsa J, Petkovic J, Agoritsas T, Bou Akl I, Al-Ansary LA, Amer YS, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: As part of the development of practice guidelines, developers need to systematically engage relevant interest-holder groups. The Reporting Items for practice Guidelines in HealThcare (RIGHT) checklist for reporting practice guidelines lacks detailed guidance on how to report the engagement process.
abstract.textZh: 作為實踐準則開發的一部分，開發人員需要系統地與相關利益相關者團體進行接觸。HealThcare實踐指南的報告項目（右）報告實踐指南的檢查清單缺乏有關如何報告參與過程的詳細指導。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To develop a standardized checklist for reporting interest-holder engagement in practice guidelines, named the RIGHT-MuSE checklist.
abstract.textZh: 制定報告利益相關者參與實踐準則的標準化檢查清單，名為RIGHT-MuSE檢查清單。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: The development process followed the methods recommended by the Enhancing the QUAlity and Transparency Of health Research (EQUATOR) Network, as well as lessons learned from the development of the RIGHT statement and its extensions. Key steps included developing the protocol, registering the project, establishing a working group, conducting background work, generating an initial list of items, conducting a consensus survey, holding panel discussions, and creating the final RIGHT-MuSE checklist and an accompanying explanation and elaboration document.
abstract.textZh: 開發過程遵循了加強健康研究（ EQUATOR ）網絡的QUAlity和透明度推薦的方法，以及從制定正確的聲明及其擴展中吸取的教訓。關鍵步驟包括開發計畫書、註冊專案、建立工作小組、進行背景工作、產生初步項目清單、進行共識調查、舉行小組討論，以及建立最終的RIGHT-MuSE檢查清單以及附帶的解釋和詳細說明文件。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: International collaboration.
abstract.textZh: 國際合作

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: 25 panelists from various guideline development interest-holder groups.

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Consensus agreement on checklist items.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The final RIGHT-MuSE checklist consists of 11 items covering the guidance used, methods of engagement, characteristics of interest-holders, evaluation of engagement, and management of conflicts of interest. The checklist is supplemented with a glossary of key terms and detailed explanations for each item to facilitate its use.

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: The RIGHT-MuSE checklist has not been evaluated in a broader context or widely applied in real-world guideline development processes.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Guideline developers can use the RIGHT-MuSE checklist to comprehensively report on interest-holder engagement.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: The Vincent and Lily Woo Foundation.
