articles.title: Performance of Lung Cancer Risk Prediction Models in Different Racial and Ethnic Groups in the United States: Results From the Lung Cancer Cohort Consortium
articles.authors: Feng X, Guida F, Guenoun A, Alcala K, Aldrich MC, Arslan AA, Cai Q, Zheng W, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Racial and ethnic disparities are a concern in lung cancer screening.

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To investigate the performance of risk prediction models to define screening eligibility across 4 U.S. racial and ethnic groups.

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Cohort study.

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: United States, Lung Cancer Cohort Consortium.

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: 641 830 participants aged 50 to 80 years with a smoking history from 12 U.S. cohorts, including 6390 Asian, 9781 Hispanic, 39 872 non-Hispanic Black, and 585 787 non-Hispanic White participants.

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Calibration and discrimination were quantified for 16 lung cancer prediction models. Then, screening-related metrics were calculated after applying model thresholds to select the same number of eligible participants as the 2021 criteria from the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force (USPSTF-2021). These included eligibility, sensitivity, and efficiency measured as estimated number needed to screen (NNS; the ratio between participants and lung cancer cases) for each strategy or prediction model in each racial and ethnic group.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: General patterns across the 16 models included substantial underestimation of lung cancer risk in non-Hispanic Black participants (expected-observed ratio < 0.75 for 11 of 16 models), lower discrimination in Asian participants than all other groups (13 of 16 models), and lower discrimination in non-Hispanic Black than non-Hispanic White participants (15 of 16 models). When a same-sized screening-eligible population as USPSTF-2021 (38.0%) was enforced, all risk-based strategies achieved better average estimated screening efficiency and reduced racial and ethnic differences in efficiency compared with USPSTF-2021. The Prostate, Lung, Colorectal, and Ovarian Cancer Screening Trial Model 2012 (PLCOm2012) and Life Years gained From Screening-Computed Tomography model (LYFS-CT) performed best (mean estimated NNS, 36.5 [SD, 8.8] and 40.1 [SD, 8.2], respectively). However, no strategy could simultaneously optimize eligibility, sensitivity, and efficiency while also reducing racial and ethnic differences.

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Smaller sample for Asian and Hispanic participants.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: To optimize efficiency and minimize its variation across racial and ethnic groups, risk-based strategies were superior to USPSTF criteria. Further optimization of prediction models for the diverse U.S. population is needed.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: U.S. National Cancer Institute, Lung Cancer Research Foundation, and Cancer Research UK.

articles.title: Advancing Family Medicine Through Dyadic Electronic Medical Record Linkage in Dementia Care
articles.authors: Robitaille A, Kokorelias KM, Aubrey-Bassler K, Barber D, Garies S, Garcia L, Grandy M, Harvey K, et al.

abstract.text: Family physicians are well-positioned to support both persons living with dementia (PLWD) and their caregivers. However, current electronic medical record (EMR) systems do not capture the relational and interdependent nature of dementia care. Dyadic data, linking the records of persons living with dementia (PLWD) and their caregivers, could support more integrated, proactive, and personalized care. While there is growing interest in leveraging EMRs for this purpose, few systems enable routine dyadic linkage, limiting clinical utility and research capacity.This report describes the current state of dyadic EMR data linkage in Canada, drawing on a pilot study using the Canadian Primary Care Sentinel Surveillance Network (CPCSSN). We examined methods for identifying PLWD-caregiver dyads in primary care settings, including manual identification and algorithmic approaches using shared contact information. Both methods were feasible, but each faced challenges related to EMR compatibility, privacy regulations, and consent processes. The study highlights how CPCSSN infrastructure can be used to create de-identified, longitudinal data sets for research and surveillance, while also identifying critical gaps that limit clinical application.Our findings demonstrate that while EMRs offer a promising platform for linking dyadic data, system-level changes are needed to fully integrate caregiver information into routine care. This includes standardized fields, clearer privacy guidelines, and cross-sector data harmonization. Dyadic EMR linkage has the potential to inform research, improve quality of care, and guide policy development. Future efforts must balance innovation with feasibility and privacy, ensuring caregiver roles are visible and valued within primary care systems.Abstract available in: يبرع (Arabic); Deutsch (German); Español (Spanish); Francais (French); हिन्दी (Hindi); Indonesia (Indonesian); (Chinese); (Japanese); Portugues (Portuguese).

articles.title: Association of General Practice Continuity With Hospital Admissions and Costs: A Retrospective Study
articles.authors: Te Winkel MT, Uijen AA, Lissenberg-Witte BI, van Marum RJ, Schers HJ, Slottje P, Bont J, Maarsingh OR

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: Continuity of care has been associated with lower health care use and costs. When general practitioners (GPs) serve as gatekeepers to hospital care, having an ongoing relationship with a GP may promote more efficient care and reduce urgent referrals, thereby lowering costs. We examined the association of 2 conceptually distinct measures of continuity in general practice with both urgent hospital admissions and hospital costs.

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted a retrospective cohort study using routinely collected health care data from 100,450 adults in 48 Dutch general practices (2013-2018) who were linked to national hospital admission and cost records (2019). Continuity was separately measured by duration of GP-patient relationship (time registered with the practice) and by density of GP contacts (Herfindahl-Hirschman index). We assessed associations with urgent admissions and log-transformed hospital costs using multilevel logistic and linear models, adjusting for sex, age, comorbidity, migration background, and income.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Compared with individuals registered with their practice for 0 to 5 years, those registered longer had 9% to 21% lower odds of urgent hospital admission, with the lowest odds seen in the group registered 15 to 20 years (adjusted odds ratio = 0.79; 95% CI, 0.70-0.88). No significant association was found between higher density of GP contacts and urgent admissions. All groups registered longer than 5 years had significantly lower hospital costs, with the largest model-based reduction (-39.7%) in the group registered 10 to 15 years. Higher density of GP contacts was also associated with lower costs, with an adjusted relative reduction of 6% to 7% in total hospital costs.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Long-standing continuity of care in general practice among adult patients is associated with reduced urgent hospital admissions and health care costs in the Netherlands. These findings highlight the potential value of sustained GP-patient relationships in improving hospital outcomes.

articles.title: Phase 3 Trial of Oral Infigratinib in Children with Achondroplasia
articles.authors: Savarirayan R, Hoover-Fong J, Irving M, Arundel P, de Bergua JM, Campeau PM, Candler T, Cocanougher BT, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Achondroplasia is a genetic skeletal condition caused by FGFR3 pathogenic variants. Infigratinib, an oral FGFR1-3 tyrosine kinase inhibitor, down-regulates key pathways in the pathogenesis of achondroplasia.

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this phase 3, multicenter, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial, we randomly assigned children with achondroplasia (3 to 17 years of age) in a 2:1 ratio to receive infigratinib (at a dose of 0.25 mg per kilogram of body weight) or placebo once daily for 52 weeks. The primary end point was the change from baseline in the annualized height velocity in the infigratinib group as compared with the placebo group at week 52. Key secondary end points were the change from baseline in the height z score and in the upper-to-lower body segment ratio at week 52. The primary analysis evaluated the treatment effect at week 52 in the full analysis population, with missing data handled with a prespecified imputation approach.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: In all, 114 patients underwent randomization: 75 patients to receive infigratinib (with 1 withdrawal before treatment) and 39 patients to receive placebo. The difference between infigratinib and placebo in the least-squares mean change from baseline to week 52 was 1.74 cm per year (95% confidence interval [CI], 1.31 to 2.17; P<0.001) for the annualized height velocity, 0.32 (96% CI, 0.23 to 0.41; P<0.001) for the height z score, and -0.02 (96% CI, -0.06 to 0.01) for the upper-to-lower body segment ratio. Adverse events occurred in 71 of 74 patients (96%) in the infigratinib group and in 37 of 39 patients (95%) in the placebo group; serious adverse events occurred in 4 of 74 patients (5%) and 1 of 39 patients (3%), respectively. No serious adverse events or adverse events leading to treatment discontinuation were considered by the investigator to be related to infigratinib or placebo.

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: In children with achondroplasia, treatment with once-daily oral infigratinib for 52 weeks resulted in a significantly greater increase from baseline in the annualized height velocity than placebo. (Funded by BridgeBio Pharma; PROPEL 3 ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT06164951; EudraCT number, 2023-506130-67.).

articles.title: Stockholm3-Magnetic Resonance Imaging Population-Based Prostate Cancer Screening Study: Two-Year Follow-up
articles.authors: Palsdottir T, Micoli C, Eklund M, Grönberg H, Jäderling F, Tilki D, Lin DW, Cooperberg MR, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Prostate-specific antigen (PSA) testing to screen for prostate cancer is controversial. An alternative approach, Stockholm3, combines PSA, plasma protein biomarkers, polygenic risk, and clinical factors into a multivariable risk score.

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To compare detection of clinically significant prostate cancer (csPC) using PSA and Stockholm3 in a population-based screening with short-term follow-up.

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Secondary analysis of the baseline round of the prospective STHLM3-MRI (Prostate Cancer Screening Using a Combination of Risk-Prediction, MRI, and Targeted Prostate Biopsies) randomized screening trial in men aged 50 to 74 years who had PSA and Stockholm3 screening. Men with abnormal screening tests (PSA ≥3 ng/mL or Stockholm3 ≥11) were randomly assigned (2:3) to systematic biopsy or magnetic resonance imaging with systematic and targeted biopsies for lesions with a Prostate Imaging Reporting and Data System score of 3 or greater. Cancer diagnosed within 2 years was identified through linkage to the Swedish National Cancer Register; cancer after a negative baseline test was classified as false negative. (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT03377881).

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Stockholm region, Sweden, 2018 to 2020.

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Men aged 50 to 74 years who had PSA and Stockholm3 screening.

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Prostate-specific antigen and Stockholm3 tests at baseline.

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Clinically significant prostate cancer (grade group ≥2) within 2 years of baseline.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 12 670 men, 443 (3.5%) were diagnosed with csPC. Decision curve analysis showed higher net benefit for Stockholm3 versus PSA across a range of decision thresholds for biopsy, indicating fewer unnecessary biopsies and fewer missed csPC cases. Stockholm3 (≥11) had a false-negative rate of 10% (43 of 443) and a false-positive rate of 11% (1289 of 12 227), whereas PSA (≥3 ng/mL) had a false-negative rate of 26% (116 of 443) and a false-positive rate of 10% (1203 of 12 227). Correspondingly, sensitivity was 90% (95% CI, 87% to 93%) for Stockholm3 and 74% (CI, 69% to 78%) for PSA, with similar specificity (89% vs. 90%).

abstract.label: LIMITATIONS
abstract.text: Participation was approximately 25% of invited men; follow-up was limited to 2 years; and the cohort was predominantly Swedish or European, which may limit generalizability.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: In this screening cohort with short-term follow-up, Stockholm3 provided greater clinical net benefit than PSA for detecting csPC, driven by fewer false-negative results, although follow-up was limited to 2 years.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: Swedish Research Council, Swedish Prostate Cancer Society, Stockholm Region, and the Swedish Cancer Society.

articles.title: Expanding Technology-Enabled, Nurse-Delivered Chronic Disease Care : A Pragmatic, Randomized, Effectiveness-Implementation Trial
articles.authors: Crowley MJ, Lewinski AA, Yang Q, Hatch D, Palipana A, Bosworth HB, Kaufman BG, Chatterjee R, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Comprehensive telehealth is used effectively for treatment-resistant chronic diseases in certain integrated health systems but has seldom been implemented in systems that provide mainly fee-for-service (FFS) care.

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To examine the effectiveness and implementation of comprehensive telehealth delivered in an FFS environment for patients with uncontrolled type 2 diabetes (T2D) and comorbid hypertension.

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Pragmatic, randomized, effectiveness-implementation trial. (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT05120544).

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: 6 academic primary care or endocrinology clinics.

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Participants had both T2D with hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) persistently at 8.0% or higher for at least 6 months and hypertension with at least 1 systolic blood pressure (BP) above 140 mm Hg or diastolic BP above 90 mm Hg in the past year.

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Two 12-month, mobile monitoring-enabled interventions: a self-monitoring control program and a nurse-delivered, comprehensive telehealth program incorporating self-management support and medication management.

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Primary (HbA1c) and secondary outcomes were evaluated at 12 months. Implementation analyses evaluated fidelity and barriers to intervention delivery.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Participants were 64% female and 68% Black. The mean age was 54.5 years, mean HbA1c 9.8%, and mean BP 135/81 mm Hg. The estimated mean change in HbA1c from 0 to 12 months was -0.7 percentage points with self-monitoring and -1.1 percentage points with comprehensive telehealth; the estimated mean between-group difference in HbA1c change at 12 months was -0.4 percentage points (95% CI, -1.0 to 0.3 percentage points). Between-group differences in change in secondary outcomes did not reach statistical significance, except for diabetes self-care (0.4 [CI, 0.0 to 0.9], favoring comprehensive telehealth). The comprehensive program was delivered with suboptimal fidelity (median encounters per participant, 9; fidelity threshold, ≥12); analyses identified barriers to program delivery.

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Generalizability to dissimilar populations and systems lacking telehealth infrastructure may be limited.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Comprehensive telehealth did not substantially lower HbA1c relative to control in this study. Population factors, intervention and control program design, and barriers to FFS implementation of comprehensive telehealth may have contributed to these findings.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: National Institute of Nursing Research and Duke Clinical & Translational Science Institute.

articles.title: Benefits and Harms of Immediate Versus Delayed Treatment of Cervical Intraepithelial Neoplasia Grade 2 : A Target Trial Emulation
articles.authors: Cheung LC, Mao F, Rydzak G, Wentzensen N, Poitras NE, Lorey TS, Castle PE

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Cervical intraepithelial neoplasia (CIN) grade 2 (CIN 2) is an equivocal diagnosis of cervical precancer, and appropriate management continues to be debated.

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate the effect of immediate (by 6 months) versus delayed (after 6 months or no) treatment of CIN 2.

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Observational emulation of a target trial of immediate versus delayed treatment, using inverse probability weighting (IPW) to adjust for baseline factors.

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Routine cervical screening at Kaiser Permanente Northern California.

abstract.label: PATIENTS
abstract.text: 12 012 women with CIN 2 found on initial biopsy from 2017 to 2023.

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Immediate treatment (excision by 6 months after initial CIN 2 without interim surveillance by screening or colposcopy) versus delayed treatment (continued surveillance by screening or colposcopy, regardless of subsequent excision timing, or excision ≥6 months after initial CIN 2).

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: 3-year probability of potentially unnecessary excision (less severe than CIN 2 [<CIN 2]), and 3-year risks for CIN grade 3 or more severe (CIN 3+) or invasive cervical cancer after initial CIN 2.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Immediate treatment was associated with a higher 3-year probability of <CIN 2 on excision compared with delayed treatment (36.2% vs. 7.8%). The IPW-standardized 3-year risks for cancer (0.39% vs. 0.43%) and CIN 3+ (8.85% vs. 10.31%) were similar under the 2 management strategies.

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Lack of randomized assignment to interventions; cancer was rare.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Immediate treatment did not reduce 3-year cancer risk compared with delayed treatment after CIN 2. Delaying treatment avoided some potentially unnecessary excisions but women with CIN 2 with immediate or delayed care were still at risk for cancer and required monitoring.

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: Intramural Research Program of the National Institutes of Health National Cancer Institute.

articles.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Pharmacologic Treatments in Adults With Overweight or Obesity: A Systematic Review for the American College of Physicians
articles.authors: Jenniskens K, Huis In 't Veld LF, Lokerse ME, Idema DL, Kusters MPT, van der Braak K, Spijker R, Vernooij RWM, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: A comprehensive overview of the cost-effectiveness of pharmacologic treatments for overweight or obesity is lacking.
abstract.textZh: 目前缺乏對超重或肥胖藥物治療的成本效益的全面概述。

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: To evaluate cost-effectiveness of pharmacologic treatments in adults with overweight or obesity in a U.S. setting.
abstract.textZh: 評估美國超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的成本效益。

abstract.label: DATA SOURCES
abstract.text: MEDLINE, Embase, and economic databases, searched on 13 October 2025.
abstract.textZh: MEDLINE、Embase 和經濟資料庫，檢索日期：2025 年 10 月 13 日。

abstract.label: STUDY SELECTION
abstract.text: Non-industry-sponsored U.S. trial-based and model-based cost-effectiveness evaluations of pharmacologic treatments in adults with overweight or obesity.
abstract.textZh: 美國非產業贊助的基於試驗和模型的對超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的成本效益評估。

abstract.label: DATA EXTRACTION
abstract.text: Data on clinical characteristics, economic characteristics (for example, model type), and study outcomes were extracted by one reviewer and verified by a second reviewer. Study quality was assessed using the CHEQUE (Criteria for Health Economic Quality Evaluation) tool; value was assessed using incremental cost-effectiveness ratios (ICERs), with thresholds for high value (<$100 000 per quality-adjusted life-year [QALY], or dominant), intermediate value ($100 000 to $200 000 per QALY), low value (>$200 000 per QALY), and no value (strict or extended dominance, or less costly and less effective); and certainty of evidence was assessed using the GRADE (Grading of Recommendations Assessment, Development and Evaluation) approach.
abstract.textZh: 有關臨床特徵、經濟特徵（例如模型類型）和研究結果的數據由一名評審員提取，並由另一名評審員驗證。使用CHECK（衛生經濟品質評估標準）工具評估研究品質；使用增量成本效益比 (ICER) 評估價值，其中高價值閾值（每個品質調整生命年 [QALY]<100 000 美元，或占主導地位）、中位數（每個 QALY 100 000 美元至 20000000 美元（美元）和無價值（嚴格或擴展主導，或成本較低）且效果較差）；證據的確定性採用 GRADE（建議評估、制定和評估分級）方法進行評估。

abstract.label: DATA SYNTHESIS
abstract.text: Four out of 9 included studies were at low risk of bias. None of the 42 pairwise comparisons that were reported had high certainty. In the 6 studies with moderate certainty, liraglutide had low value and phentermine-topiramate and tirzepatide had high value when each was compared with lifestyle modification. Semaglutide had low value compared with naltrexone-bupropion and phentermine-topiramate and high value compared with liraglutide.
abstract.textZh: 9 篇納入研究中有 4 篇具有低偏倚風險。所報告的 42 項配對比較中沒有一項具有高確定性。在 6 項中等確定性研究中，與生活方式改變進行比較時，利拉魯肽的價值較低，芬特明-托吡酯和替澤帕肽的價值較高。索馬魯肽與納曲酮-安非他酮和芬特明-托吡酯相比價值較低，與利拉魯肽相比價值較高。

abstract.label: LIMITATIONS
abstract.text: All studies were model-based. ICERs were not reported for all potential treatment comparisons. Most studies had incomplete reporting or were at high risk of bias.
abstract.textZh: 所有研究都是基於模型的。沒有報告所有潛在治療比較的 ICER。大多數研究的報告不完整或有很高的偏倚風險。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Current evidence on cost-effectiveness of pharmacologic treatment of overweight or obesity is hampered by poor-quality studies, limiting the ability to draw conclusions.
abstract.textZh: 目前關於超重或肥胖藥物治療成本效益的證據受到低品質研究的阻礙，限制了結論的能力。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: American College of Physicians. (PROSPERO: CRD42023491646).
abstract.textZh: 美國內科醫師學會。 （普洛斯彼羅：CRD42023491646）。

articles.titleZh: 超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的成本效益：美國醫師學會的系統性評價

articles.title: Benefits and Harms of Pharmacologic Treatments in Adults With Overweight or Obesity: A Living Systematic Review and Network Meta-analysis for the American College of Physicians
articles.authors: Damen JAA, Idema DL, Vernooij RWM, Huis In 't Veld LF, Kusters MPT, Lokerse ME, de Kanter E, Spijker R, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Overweight and obesity are closely linked to diseases such as type 2 diabetes, coronary heart disease, and stroke and have been shown to increase mortality risk.
abstract.textZh: 超重和肥胖與第2型糖尿病、冠狀動脈心臟病和中風等疾病密切相關，並已被證明會增加死亡風險。

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: To conduct a living systematic review of pharmacologic treatments for weight management in overweight or obesity in adults.
abstract.textZh: 對成人超重或肥胖的體重管理藥物治療進行即時系統性回顧。

abstract.label: DATA SOURCES
abstract.text: MEDLINE and Cochrane Central Register of Controlled Trials until October 2025.
abstract.textZh: MEDLINE 和 Cochrane 對照試驗中央註冊庫截至 2025 年 10 月。

abstract.label: STUDY SELECTION
abstract.text: Randomized controlled trials that compared pharmacologic treatments for weight management (dulaglutide, exenatide, liraglutide, lixisenatide, naltrexone-bupropion, orforglipron, phentermine, phentermine-topiramate, retatrutide, semaglutide, semaglutide-cagrilintide, tirzepatide, or any combination with or without lifestyle intervention [LI]) for overweight or obesity (body mass index ≥25 kg/m2) in adults for outcomes such as mortality, weight loss, and quality of life.
abstract.textZh: 比較體重管理藥物治療（度拉魯肽、艾塞那肽、利拉魯肽、利西拉肽、納曲酮-安非他酮、奧福格列酮、芬特明、芬特明-托吡酯、瑞他魯肽、索馬魯肽、索馬魯肽-卡格林肽、替澤帕肽或有或沒有生活方式乾預的任何組合[LI]）對體重指數的任何體重指數對超重或沒有體重測量的至少25125或沒有生活方式乾預。 kg/m2）對於成人的死亡率、體重減輕和生活品質等結果。

abstract.label: DATA EXTRACTION
abstract.text: One reviewer extracted data and assessed risk of bias and certainty of the evidence; a second reviewer verified these data.
abstract.textZh: 評審員擷取資料並評估偏倚風險和證據的確定性；第二位評審員驗證了這些資料。

abstract.label: DATA SYNTHESIS
abstract.text: The review included 69 studies with a total of 112 511 participants. Thirty-seven studies were at low risk of bias. In meta-analyses, nearly all studied interventions were more effective than placebo and/or LI in reducing weight, but more discontinuations due to adverse events were observed. Semaglutide probably reduced mortality and major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE), and both semaglutide and tirzepatide led to the greatest weight loss compared with placebo and/or LI in pairwise and network meta-analyses. Evidence for outcomes such as mortality, MACE, and serious adverse events was limited.
abstract.textZh: 該綜述包括 69 項研究，共有 112 511 名參與者。 37 項研究的偏倚風險較低。在統合分析中，幾乎所有研究的介入措施在減重方面都比安慰劑和/或 LI 更有效，但觀察到更多因不良事件而停藥的情況。索馬魯肽可能降低死亡率和主要不良心血管事件 (MACE)，在配對和網絡統合分析中，與安慰劑和/或 LI 相比，索馬魯肽和替西帕肽均導致最大的體重減輕。死亡率、MACE 和嚴重不良事件等結局的證據有限。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Direct head-to-head comparisons of different treatments were limited.
abstract.textZh: 不同治療方法的直接直接比較是有限的。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Nearly all studied interventions were more effective than placebo and/or LI in reducing weight. Semaglutide and tirzepatide showed the most favorable results across outcomes.
abstract.textZh: 幾乎所有研究的干預措施在減輕體重方面都比安慰劑和/或 LI 更有效。索馬魯肽和替澤帕肽在所有結局中顯示出最有利的結果。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: American College of Physicians. (PROSPERO: CRD42023491646).
abstract.textZh: 美國內科醫師學會。 （普洛斯彼羅：CRD42023491646）。

articles.titleZh: 超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的益處和危害：美國醫師學會的即時系統性回顧和網絡統合分析

articles.title: Multimodal Prehabilitation for Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion : A Randomized Clinical Trial
articles.authors: Wang S, Wang P, Li J, Han D, Zhao Y, Zhang Y, Li Z, Du Y, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Older adults often have impaired physiologic reserve and are at higher risk for postoperative complications after spinal fusion surgery.
abstract.textZh: 老年人通常生理儲備受損，脊椎融合手術後發生術後併發症的風險較高。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To evaluate the efficacy of multimodal prehabilitation plus Enhanced Recovery After Surgery (PREERAS) versus ERAS alone on 90-day postoperative complications in older adults undergoing elective spinal fusion.
abstract.textZh: 旨在評估多模式預復健合併加速復健外科 (PREERAS) 與單獨 ERAS 對接受擇期脊椎融合的老年人術後 90 天併發症的療效。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Multicenter, open-label, assessor-blinded, 1:1 parallel-group randomized controlled trial. (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT06140797).
abstract.textZh: 多中心、開放標籤、評估者盲法、1:1 平行組隨機對照試驗。 （ClinicalTrials.gov：NCT06140797）。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: 3 tertiary hospitals in China.
abstract.textZh: 中國三級醫院3家。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Adults aged 75 years or older undergoing elective spinal fusion surgery between May 2024 and May 2025.
abstract.textZh: 2024 年 5 月至 2025 年 5 月期間接受選擇性脊椎融合手術的 75 歲或以上成年人。

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Participants were randomly assigned to receive either preoperative Vivifrail-based, multimodal PREERAS (PREERAS group) or ERAS alone (ERAS group). The 4-week prehabilitation program integrated supervised group sessions, Vivifrail multicomponent exercise, nutritional optimization, and psychological interventions.
abstract.textZh: 參與者被隨機分配接受術前基於 Vivifrail 的多模式 PREERAS（PREERAS 組）或單獨 ERAS（ERAS 組）。為期 4 週的預復健計畫整合了監督小組課程、Vivifrail 多成分運動、營養優化和心理幹預。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: The primary outcome was the occurrence of any postoperative complication within 90 days of surgery, recorded and graded per the Clavien-Dindo classification system.
abstract.textZh: 主要結局是手術後 90 天內發生的任何術後併發症，根據 Clavien-Dindo 分類系統進行記錄和分級。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 312 patients were assessed for eligibility, with 164 randomly assigned. Of the 159 patients included in the final analysis (mean age, 78.7 years; 59% women), 59 patients (74.7%) in the PREERAS group and 73 patients (91.2%) in the ERAS group experienced at least 1 complication (risk ratio, 0.80 [95% CI, 0.67 to 0.95]; risk difference, -18.0% [CI, -27.0% to -9.0%]).
abstract.textZh: 共有 312 名患者接受了資格評估，其中 164 名患者被隨機分配。在最終分析中納入的 159 名患者（平均年齡為 78.7 歲；59% 為女性）中，PREERAS 組中的 59 名患者（74.7%）和 ERAS 組中的 73 名患者（91.2%）經歷了至少 1 種併發症（風險比，0.80 [95% CI，0.95%，0.95%， -27.0% 至 -9.0%]）。

abstract.label: LIMITATIONS
abstract.text: Unblinded participants and clinicians. Generalizability may be limited with longer hospital stays in the Chinese health care system.
abstract.textZh: 不設盲的參與者和臨床醫師。由於中國醫療保健系統中住院時間較長，普遍性可能會受到限制。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: The implementation of multimodal prehabilitation in 3 tertiary hospitals in China reduced 90-day postoperative complications in older adults undergoing enhanced recovery after spinal fusion surgery. However, individual sites will need to consider applicability of findings and resource requirements of prehabilitation before implementation.
abstract.textZh: 中國3家三級醫院實施多模式預康復，減少了脊椎融合手術加速康復的老年人術後90天的併發症。然而，各個地點在實施之前需要考慮調查結果的適用性和預康復的資源需求。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: Capital's Funds for Health Improvement and Research.
abstract.textZh: 資本健康改善和研究基金。

articles.titleZh: 接受脊椎融合術的老年人的多模式預復健：一項隨機臨床試驗

articles.title: Dementia Risk After Recombinant Herpes Zoster Vaccination in Older Adults With a Recent Skilled-Nursing Facility Stay : A Target Trial Emulation
articles.authors: Hayes KN, Harris DA, McConeghy KW, Grove LR, Joshi R, Han L, Davidson HE, Chachlani P, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Observational studies report a protective association between herpes zoster (HZ) vaccination and dementia, but they have methodological limitations or examined a live attenuated vaccine no longer available in the United States.
abstract.textZh: 觀察性研究報告帶狀皰疹 (HZ) 疫苗接種與失智症之間存在保護性關聯，但它們存在方法學局限性，或檢查了美國不再提供的減毒活疫苗。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: Among older adults recently admitted to a skilled-nursing facility for postacute or long-term care, to estimate the association between dementia and receipt of the recombinant HZ vaccine (RZV) within 12 months of entering the facility or after discharge.
abstract.textZh: 在最近入住專業護理機構進行急性期後或長期護理的老年人中，評估癡呆症與進入機構後 12 個月內或出院後接種重組帶狀皰疹疫苗 (RZV) 之間的關聯。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: The researchers conducted a cohort study using target trial emulation and the clone-censor-weight approach. Participants were followed for up to 4 years until the outcome of dementia, Medicare disenrollment, or death. Inverse probability of clone-censoring weights were applied to pooled logistic regression models to estimate effects.
abstract.textZh: 研究人員使用目標試驗模擬和克隆審查權重方法進行了一項隊列研究。參與者被追蹤長達 4 年，直到出現失智症、退出醫療保險或死亡。將克隆審查權重的逆機率應用於合併邏輯迴歸模型以估計效果。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Medicare claims linked to nursing home electronic health record (EHR) data.
abstract.textZh: 醫療保險索賠與療養院電子健康記錄 (EHR) 數據相關。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries aged 66 years or older who were admitted to a skilled-nursing facility between 1 January 2017 and 31 December 2022, had linked EHR data, had no diagnosed dementia, and were eligible for RZV.
abstract.textZh: 醫療保險按服務收費受益人，年齡為 66 歲或以上，在 2017 年 1 月 1 日至 2022 年 12 月 31 日期間入住熟練護理機構，已關聯 EHR 數據，未診斷出癡呆症，並且有資格享受 RZV。

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Receipt of at least 1 RZV in the facility or, if discharged, by 12 months after admission versus no receipt of RZV.
abstract.textZh: 在機構中至少收到 1 個 RZV，或如果出院，則在入院後 12 個月內收到至少 1 個 RZV，而不是沒有收到 RZV。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Validated dementia diagnosis and 57 baseline and time-varying covariates.
abstract.textZh: 經過驗證的癡呆症診斷和 57 個基線和時變協變數。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The study cohort included 509 926 participants (mean age, 79 years); 8843 (1.73%) received at least 1 RZV dose within 12 months after admission, and of these, 87.0% received RZV after discharge. Receipt of RZV was associated with risk for dementia being 5.8 percentage points lower (95% CI, 3.9 to 7.5 percentage points lower; risk ratio, 0.76 [CI, 0.69 to 0.84]; 4-year risk, 18.8% with ≥1 RZV vs. 24.6% with no RZV). Associations were attenuated in men and those with prior live HZ vaccination.
abstract.textZh: 研究族群包括 509 926 名參與者（平均年齡 79 歲）； 8,843 例（1.73%）在入院後 12 個月內至少接受 1 劑 RZV，其中 87.0% 在出院後接受了 RZV。接受 RZV 與失智症風險降低 5.8 個百分點相關（95% CI，降低 3.9 至 7.5 個百分點；風險比，0.76 [CI，0.69 至 0.84]；4 年風險，≥1 RZV 為 18.8%，而沒有 RZV 為 24.6%）。在男性和先前接種過活帶狀皰疹疫苗的人中，關聯性減弱。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Negative control analyses suggest some residual confounding.
abstract.textZh: 陰性對照分析顯示存在一些殘留的混雜因素。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Receipt of RZV during admission to a skilled-nursing facility or within 12 months was associated with lower dementia risk.
abstract.textZh: 在進入專業護理機構期間或 12 個月內接受 RZV 與較低的失智症風險相關。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: GlaxoSmithKline.
abstract.textZh: 葛蘭素史克。

articles.titleZh: 最近入住熟練護理機構的老年人接種重組帶狀皰疹疫苗後的癡呆風險：目標試驗模擬
